built with pdoc

dab

DAB Radio receiver on USB HID

Warning: This is a debug version

This is a control panel of DAB radio receiver. This program is build with Python 3, PySide 6 and QtDesigner. The device is plugged on USB HID. The style is combinear.qss

For installation read readme.txt file and requirements.txt.

Author: Alain the Cat Local Website: mao2.fr

   1#!/usr/bin/python3
   2# This Python file uses the following encoding: utf-8
   3# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
   4"""
   5 DAB Radio receiver on USB HID
   6
   7 Warning: This is a debug version
   8
   9 This is a control panel of DAB radio receiver.
  10 This program is build with Python 3, PySide 6 and QtDesigner.
  11 The device is plugged on USB HID.
  12 The style is combinear.qss
  13
  14 For installation read readme.txt file and requirements.txt.
  15
  16 Author: Alain the Cat
  17 Local Website: mao2.fr
  18"""
  19
  20import os
  21import platform
  22import sys
  23import hid
  24import json
  25
  26from MainWindow import Ui_Form
  27from PySide6.QtWidgets import QMainWindow, QMessageBox, QApplication, QTableWidgetItem, QFileDialog, QInputDialog
  28from PySide6.QtCore import QTimer, QObject, Signal, QDate, QTime, QByteArray, QFile, QIODevice
  29from PySide6.QtGui import QIcon, QPixmap
  30
  31from hid import HIDException
  32from qled import QLed
  33from serviceTable import TableService
  34from ensemblePanel import Ensemble
  35from preset import Preset
  36from service import Service
  37from constants import DLS_Ascii, VENDOR_ID, PRODUCT_ID
  38from localErrors import UsbHidIOError
  39from pathlib import Path
  40
  41class Communicate(QObject):
  42    updateDisplay = Signal(int)
  43
  44def checkDevice():
  45    """Checks the device on Linux or Windows platform."""
  46    if platform.system() == "Linux" or platform.system() == "Windows":
  47        try:
  48            device = hid.Device(vid=VENDOR_ID, pid=PRODUCT_ID)
  49            return device
  50        except HIDException as e:
  51            if platform.system() == "Linux":
  52                try:
  53                    res = hid.enumerate(vid=VENDOR_ID, pid=PRODUCT_ID)
  54                    dict1 = res[0]
  55                    hidPath = dict1["path"].decode()
  56                    msgBox1 = QMessageBox()
  57                    msgBox1.setWindowTitle("DEVICE ERROR")
  58                    msgBox1.setText("Permission denied")
  59                    msgBox1.setInformativeText("Plug your Device and give permission\n sudo chmod 0666 " + hidPath)
  60                    msgBox1.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok)
  61                    if msgBox1.exec() == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok:
  62                        exit()
  63                    else:
  64                        pass
  65                except HIDException as e:
  66                    msgBox3 = QMessageBox()
  67                    msgBox3.setWindowTitle("DEVICE ERROR")
  68                    msgBox3.setText("Device no found")
  69                    msgBox3.setInformativeText("Plug your device:" + e)
  70                    msgBox3.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok)
  71                    if msgBox3.exec() == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok:
  72                        exit()
  73                    else:
  74                        pass
  75            else:
  76                msgBox2 = QMessageBox()
  77                msgBox2.setWindowTitle("DEVICE ERROR")
  78                msgBox2.setText("Device no found")
  79                msgBox2.setInformativeText("Plug your device !")
  80                msgBox2.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok)
  81                if msgBox2.exec() == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok:
  82                    exit()
  83                else:
  84                    pass
  85
  86
  87def serviceListNotAvailable():
  88    """Displays in a popup that the service list is not available(case response is 0xFF)."""
  89    msgBox4 = QMessageBox()
  90    msgBox4.setWindowTitle("DAB ERROR")
  91    msgBox4.setText("Service List is not available !!!")
  92    msgBox4.setInformativeText("Check your antenna or start a new scan.")
  93    msgBox4.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok)
  94    if msgBox4.exec() == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok:
  95        pass
  96    else:
  97        pass
  98
  99
 100class Dab(QMainWindow, Ui_Form):
 101    """DAB Radio panel (creating and playing)"""
 102
 103    def __init__(self):
 104        """Initializes the MainWindow class"""
 105        super().__init__()
 106
 107        # ---INIT PANEL ---
 108        # Creating main window from dab.ui / dab.py
 109        self.setupUi(self)
 110        self.setWindowIcon(QIcon("radio.png"))
 111        self.setWindowTitle("RADIO DAB")
 112
 113        # --- INIT SOME VARIABLE ---
 114        # Read and write buffers
 115        self.bufferIn = [0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
 116                         0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
 117                         0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00]
 118        """
 119        IN -> Read from the Device
 120        Received data will be stored here - the first byte in the array is unused
 121        bufferInSize = 40  -> Size of the data buffer coming IN to the PC
 122        """
 123        self.bufferOut = [0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
 124                          0x00]
 125        """
 126        OUT -> Write to the device
 127        Transmitted data is stored here - the first item in the array must be 0
 128        bufferOutSize = 16  -> Size of the data buffer going OUT from the PC
 129        """
 130
 131        #  Creating list of services
 132        self.nbServices = 0
 133        self.services = []
 134        self.currentIndex = 0
 135        self.totalServices = 0
 136        self.tuneIndex = 0
 137        self.rowPosition = 0
 138        self.currentTuneIndex = 0
 139        self.currentTuneFrequency = 0
 140        self.currentEID = 0x00
 141        self.currentComponentLabel = ""
 142
 143        #  Creating list of presets
 144        self.nbPresets = 0
 145        self.presets = []
 146
 147        self.hidToSend = False
 148
 149        # Init Status Bar
 150        self.dynamicLabel = "Alain is - the best"
 151        self.artist = ""
 152        self.title = ""
 153
 154        self.packetIndex = 0
 155        self.PADDataType = 0
 156        self.DLSType = 0
 157        self.MOTSLSType = 0
 158        self.DLSLength = 0
 159        self.SLSLength = 0
 160        self.payloadLength = 0
 161
 162        self.jackStatus = 0x00
 163        """Analog or Optical output"""
 164        self.labelVolume = "0"
 165
 166        # Init Picture
 167        self.imageStart = False
 168        """Beginning for load the picture""" 
 169        self.pathPicture = ""
 170        """Path of the picture"""
 171        self.pictureByte = QByteArray()
 172        """Content of the picture in Byte format"""
 173        self.pictureFile = "picture.jpg"
 174        """Picture name for init"""
 175        self.pictureResult = []
 176        """Content array of the picture"""
 177        self.fileJPG = QFile
 178        """File for load Image"""
 179        self.saveImage = False
 180
 181        # --- INIT DEVICE ---
 182        self.myDevice = checkDevice()
 183
 184        # --- INIT SOME WIDGET ---
 185        self.pushButtonOn.setEnabled(True)
 186        self.pushButtonOff.setEnabled(False)
 187        self.pushButtonScan.setEnabled(False)
 188        self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(False)
 189        self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(False)
 190        self.checkBoxArtistTitle.setEnabled(False)
 191        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setEnabled(False)
 192        self.pushButtonSaveList.setEnabled(False)
 193        self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(False)
 194        self.checkBoxSaveImage.setEnabled(False)
 195        self.presetsButtonDisabled()
 196
 197        self.toolStripStatusLabel1.setText("DAB Tuner not connected")
 198        self.toolStripStatusLabel2.setText("")
 199        self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("")
 200        self.toolStripStatusLabel4.setText("")
 201
 202        self.bufferAddress = [0x00, 0x01, 0x02, 0x03, 0x04, 0x05, 0x06, 0x07, 0x08, 0x09, 0x10, 0x11, 0x012,
 203                              0x13, 0x14, 0x15, 0x16, 0x17, 0x18, 0x19, 0x20, 0x21, 0x22, 0x23, 0x24, 0x25,
 204                              0x26, 0x27, 0x28, 0x29, 0x30, 0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34, 0x35, 0x36, 0x37, 0x38,
 205                              0x39]
 206
 207        self.dataAddress = ' '.join('{:02X}'.format(a) for a in self.bufferAddress)
 208        self.lineEditAddress.setText(self.dataAddress)
 209
 210        self.led = QLed()
 211        self.layoutPower.insertWidget(0, self.led)
 212
 213        self.image = QPixmap()
 214
 215        self.service = TableService()
 216
 217        self.ensemble = Ensemble()
 218        # For scanning, create a tab :
 219        # row -> tune index
 220        # column -> 0: tune index, 1: frequency, 2: RSSI, 3: valid, 4: nb services
 221        self.my_array = [[0 for col in range(5)] for row in range(41)]
 222        headerH = ['Preset','Service Name', 'Service ID', 'Component ID', 'Tune Index', 'Tune Frequency kHz', 'EID',
 223                   'Component Label', ]
 224        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setHorizontalHeaderLabels(headerH)
 225
 226        # --- INIT CONNECTIONS ---
 227        self.pushButtonOn.clicked.connect(self.on)
 228        self.pushButtonOff.clicked.connect(self.off)
 229        self.pushButtonScan.clicked.connect(self.buttonScanClick)
 230
 231        self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.valueChanged.connect(self.hScrollBarVolumeValueChanged)
 232
 233        self.tableWidgetViewServices.clicked.connect(self.dataGridViewServicesCellClick)
 234
 235        self.checkBoxMono.clicked.connect(self.checkBoxMonoClick)
 236        self.checkBoxMute.clicked.connect(self.checkBoxMuteClick)
 237
 238        self.comboBoxAreas.addItems(["Default Area"])
 239        self.comboBoxAreas.setCurrentText("Default Area")
 240
 241        self.checkBoxSaveImage.clicked.connect(self.saveImageEnable)
 242
 243        self.memory = False
 244        self.pushButtonMemory.clicked.connect(self.buttonMemoryClick)
 245
 246        # Find the different Services list (json files in json directory)
 247        # and add this services list in Areas comboBx
 248        self.getServicesFile()
 249        self.pushButtonSaveList.clicked.connect(self.saveServicesList)
 250
 251        # --- PUSH BUTTON PRESETS ---
 252
 253        self.pushButtonPreset1.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(0))
 254        self.pushButtonPreset2.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(1))
 255        self.pushButtonPreset3.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(2))
 256        self.pushButtonPreset4.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(3))
 257        self.pushButtonPreset5.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(4))
 258        self.pushButtonPreset6.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(5))
 259        self.pushButtonPreset7.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(6))
 260        self.pushButtonPreset8.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(7))
 261        self.pushButtonPreset9.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(8))
 262        self.pushButtonPreset10.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(9))
 263        self.pushButtonPreset11.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(10))
 264        self.pushButtonPreset12.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(11))
 265
 266        # --- CHECK SOME FUNCTION
 267        # self.pushButtonTest4.clicked.connect(self.timer4Tick)
 268
 269        self.com = Communicate()
 270
 271        # --- INIT TIMERS ---
 272        # Power Up -> delay one shot 100 mSec
 273        self.timerPowerUp = QTimer()
 274        self.timerPowerUp.setSingleShot(True)
 275        self.timerPowerUp.timeout.connect(self.open)
 276
 277        # Power Down -> delay one shot 50 mSec
 278        self.timerPowerDown = QTimer()
 279        self.timerPowerDown.setSingleShot(True)
 280        self.timerPowerDown.timeout.connect(self.off)
 281
 282        # Artist Title -> delay one shot 100 mSec
 283        self.timerArtistTitle = QTimer()
 284        self.timerArtistTitle.setSingleShot(True)
 285        # self.timerArtistTitle.timeout.connect(self.timerArtistTitleTick)
 286
 287        # New Ensemble -> delay one shot 300 mSec
 288        self.timerNewEnsemble = QTimer()
 289        self.timerNewEnsemble.setSingleShot(True)
 290        self.timerNewEnsemble.timeout.connect(self.timerNewEnsembleTick())
 291
 292        # Read device -> periodic delay 50 mSec
 293        self.timerReadDevice = QTimer()
 294        self.timerReadDevice.timeout.connect(self.readDevice)
 295
 296        # HID to send -> delay 50 mSec
 297        # self.timerHidToSend = QTimer()
 298        # self.timerHidToSend.timeout.connect(self.timerHidToSendTick())
 299
 300
 301    def off(self):
 302        """Power Off"""
 303        self.led.toggleValue()
 304        self.toolStripStatusLabel1.setText("DAB Tuner Disconnected")
 305        self.toolStripStatusLabel2.setText("")
 306        self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("")
 307        self.toolStripStatusLabel4.setText("")
 308        self.pushButtonOn.setEnabled(True)
 309        self.pushButtonOff.setEnabled(False)
 310        self.comboBoxAreas.setEnabled(True)
 311        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setEnabled(False)
 312        self.presetsButtonDisabled()
 313        self.clearPanel()
 314        self.clearTextBox()
 315
 316    def close(self):
 317        """Closes the device (Stand by)."""
 318        # self.timerPowerDown.stop()
 319        self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setValue(0)
 320        self.bufferOut[0] = 0x00
 321        self.bufferOut[1] = 0x00  # Stand by the device ( stop the HID coming IN to the PC )
 322        # self.hidToSend = True
 323        self.hidSend()
 324        self.timerPowerDown.start(50) # Power off after 50ms delay
 325
 326    def clearPanel(self):
 327        """Clears this panel."""
 328        self.labelRSSI.setText("0 db V")
 329        self.labelSNR.setText("0 dB")
 330        self.labelCNR.setText("0 dB")
 331        self.labelFIC.setText("0")
 332        self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(False)
 333        self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(False)
 334        self.checkBoxSaveImage.setEnabled(False)
 335        self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(False)
 336
 337    def clearTextBox(self):
 338        """Clears all TextBox (lineEdit)"""
 339        self.lineEditCurrentService.setText("")
 340        self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("")
 341        self.lineEditTitle.setText("")
 342        self.lineEditBufferIn.setText("")
 343        self.lineEditBufferOut.setText("")
 344        self.lineEditPacket.setText("")
 345        self.lineEditPictureName.setText("")
 346        self.lineEditDateTime.setText("")
 347
 348    def on(self):
 349        """Power On"""
 350        # Load Services list from selected json file in Area SpinBox
 351        # and prohibit changing the services list
 352        self.loadServiceList()
 353        self.comboBoxAreas.setEnabled(False)
 354
 355        # Load Presets list from Services list with position mark ("1" to "12")
 356        self.loadPresets()
 357
 358        # Update Status Bar
 359        self.toolStripStatusLabel1.setText("DAB Tuner connected")
 360        self.toolStripStatusLabel2.setText("")
 361        self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("")
 362        self.toolStripStatusLabel4.setText("")
 363
 364        # Swap buttons On/Off
 365        self.pushButtonOn.setEnabled(False)
 366        self.pushButtonOff.setEnabled(True)
 367
 368        # Some Buttons are now enabled
 369        self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(True)
 370        self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(True)
 371        self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(True)
 372        self.checkBoxArtistTitle.setEnabled(True)
 373        self.checkBoxSaveImage.setEnabled(True)
 374        self.pushButtonScan.setEnabled(True)
 375        self.pushButtonSaveList.setEnabled(True)
 376
 377        # light on the LED
 378        self.led.toggleValue()
 379
 380        self.timerPowerUp.start(100)    # Sends the open command after a 100 ms delay
 381
 382    def open(self):
 383        """Opens the device. A HID device has been plugged in..."""
 384        # self.timerPowerUp.stop()
 385        self.bufferOut[0] = 0x00
 386        self.bufferOut[1] = 0x01
 387        self.bufferOut[2] = 0x02
 388        self.bufferOut[3] = 0x00
 389        self.bufferOut[4] = 0x00
 390        self.bufferOut[5] = 0x09
 391        self.bufferOut[6] = 0xF2
 392        self.bufferOut[7] = 0x00
 393        self.bufferOut[8] = 0x00
 394        self.bufferOut[9] = 0x00
 395        self.bufferOut[10] = 0x00
 396        self.bufferOut[11] = 0x00
 397        self.bufferOut[12] = 0x00
 398        self.bufferOut[13] = 0x00
 399        self.bufferOut[14] = 0x00
 400        self.bufferOut[15] = 0x00
 401        # self.hidToSend = True
 402        self.hidSend()
 403        self.timerReadDevice.start(10)  # Reads the device every 50ms
 404
 405    def getServicesFile(self):
 406        """Gets number of file services json and name of this file and updates the Areas comboBox"""
 407        directory = "json"
 408        files = [f for f in os.listdir(directory) if os.path.isfile(os.path.join(directory, f))]
 409        for row in range(1,len(files)):
 410            item = files[row].replace("services-", "").replace(".json", "")
 411            self.comboBoxAreas.addItems([item])
 412
 413    def loadServiceList(self):
 414        """Loads the Services List."""
 415        index = self.comboBoxAreas.currentIndex()
 416        if index == 0 :
 417            serviceList = "json/services-Default.json"
 418        else:
 419            serviceList = "json/services-"+ self.comboBoxAreas.currentText() + ".json"
 420
 421        # List all services from json file
 422        with open(serviceList, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
 423            data1 = json.load(f)
 424
 425        self.nbServices = sum([1 for i in data1])
 426
 427        self.services.clear()
 428        # Appending instances to list
 429        for i in range(1, self.nbServices + 1):
 430            self.services.append(
 431                Service(
 432                    data1["service" + str(i)]["Preset"],
 433                    data1["service" + str(i)]["Service Name"],
 434                    data1["service" + str(i)]["Service ID"],
 435                    data1["service" + str(i)]["Component ID"],
 436                    data1["service" + str(i)]["Tune Index"],
 437                    data1["service" + str(i)]["Tune Frequency kHz"],
 438                    data1["service" + str(i)]["EID"],
 439                    data1["service" + str(i)]["Component Label"]
 440                )
 441            )
 442        self.tableWidgetViewServices.clearContents() # Clear the table of services
 443        if self.nbServices != 0 :
 444            for row in range(0, self.nbServices):
 445                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 0, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].preset))
 446                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 1, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].serviceName))
 447                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 2, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].serviceID))
 448                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 3, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].componentID))
 449                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 4, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].tuneIndex))
 450                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 5, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].tuneFrequency))
 451                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 6, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].EID))
 452                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 7, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].componentLabel))
 453            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("Select a Service from the list")
 454
 455            # Load all presets
 456            self.nbPresets = 0
 457            self.presets.clear()
 458
 459            for index in range(1, 13):
 460                for row in range(0, self.nbServices):
 461                    if self.services[row].preset == str(index):
 462                        self.presets.append(
 463                            Preset(
 464                                str(row),
 465                                self.services[row].serviceName,
 466                                self.services[row].serviceID,
 467                                self.services[row].componentID,
 468                                self.services[row].tuneIndex,
 469                                self.services[row].tuneFrequency,
 470                                self.services[row].EID,
 471                                self.services[row].componentLabel
 472                            )
 473                        )
 474            self.nbPresets = len(self.presets)
 475            self.loadPresets()
 476        else :
 477            msgBox5 = QMessageBox()
 478            msgBox5.setWindowTitle("DAB WARNING")
 479            msgBox5.setText("Services list is empty : scan for services")
 480            msgBox5.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok)
 481            if msgBox5.exec() == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok:
 482                pass
 483            else:
 484                pass
 485
 486    def loadServiceListAfterScan(self):
 487        """Loads Service List  after scan"""
 488        self.tableWidgetViewServices.clearContents()  # Clear the table of services
 489        if self.nbServices != 0:
 490            for row in range(0, self.nbServices):
 491                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 0, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].preset))
 492                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 1, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].serviceName))
 493                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 2, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].serviceID))
 494                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 3, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].componentID))
 495                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 4, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].tuneIndex))
 496                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 5, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].tuneFrequency))
 497                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 6, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].EID))
 498                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 7, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].componentLabel))
 499            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("Select a Service from the list")
 500
 501    def readDevice(self):
 502        """Reads the device"""
 503        # self.timer.stop()
 504        try:
 505            self.bufferIn = self.myDevice.read(size=40, timeout=1)
 506            if self.bufferIn:
 507                dataInHex = ' '.join('{:02X}'.format(a) for a in self.bufferIn)
 508                self.lineEditBufferIn.setText(dataInHex)
 509                self.onRead()
 510        except UsbHidIOError:
 511            pass
 512            # msgBox = QMessageBox()
 513            # msgBox.setWindowTitle("Message")
 514            # msgBox.setText("Reading error")
 515            # msgBox.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel)
 516            # msgBox.setDefaultButton(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel)
 517            # answer = msgBox.exec()
 518            # if answer == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel:
 519            #     pass
 520
 521    def onRead(self):
 522        """Reads bytes in bufferIn from the microcontroller and determines which function to run.
 523        These bytes come after 50 ms interval maximum.
 524        """
 525        # self.timerHidToSend.start(50)
 526
 527        match self.bufferIn[0]:
 528            case 0x08:                # Response 0x08 GET_PART_INFO ( See AN649 )
 529                self.partInfo()
 530            case 0x09:               # Response 0x09 GET_SYS_STATE ( See AN649 )
 531                self.systemState()
 532            case 0x12:               # Response 0x12 GET_FUNC_INFO ( See AN649 )
 533                self.firmwareRevision()
 534            case 0x80:               # Response 0x80 GET_DIGITAL_SERVICE_LIST ( See AN649 )
 535                self.digitalServiceList()
 536            case 0x84:               # Response 0x84. GET_DIGITAL_SERVICE_DATA ( See AN649 )
 537                self.getDigitalServiceData()
 538            case 0xB2:               # Response 0xB2 DAB_DIGRAD_STATUS ( See AN649 )
 539                self.dabDigradStatus()
 540            case 0xB4:               # Response 0xB4 DAB_GET_ENSEMBLE_INFO ( See AN649 )
 541                self.ensembleInfo()
 542            case 0xBC:               # Response 0xBC DAB_GET_TIME ( See AN649 )
 543                self.dabGetTime()
 544            case 0xBD:               # Response 0xBD DAB_GET_AUDIO_INFO ( See AN649 )
 545                self.dabGetAudioInfo()
 546            case 0xC0:               # Response 0xC0 DAB_GET_SERVICE_INFO ( See AN649 )
 547                self.dabGetServiceInfo()
 548            case 0xF0:               # Tuning for a new ensemble
 549                self.tuningForNewEnsemble()
 550            case 0xFF:               # Service List not available
 551                serviceListNotAvailable()
 552
 553    def partInfo(self):
 554        """Provides the Part Info (Skyworks and Microchip numbers)."""
 555        Skyworks_Part_Number = str(self.bufferIn[13] * 256 + self.bufferIn[12])
 556        Microchip_Part_Number = chr(self.bufferIn[27]) + chr(self.bufferIn[28]) + chr(self.bufferIn[29]) + \
 557                                chr(self.bufferIn[30]) + chr(self.bufferIn[31]) + chr(self.bufferIn[32]) + \
 558                                chr(self.bufferIn[33]) + chr(self.bufferIn[34]) + chr(self.bufferIn[35]) + \
 559                                chr(self.bufferIn[36]) + chr(self.bufferIn[37]) + chr(self.bufferIn[38])
 560        partInfoText = Microchip_Part_Number + " / Si" + Skyworks_Part_Number
 561        self.toolStripStatusLabel2.setText(partInfoText)
 562
 563    def systemState(self):
 564        """Analyzes the states of the system.
 565        """
 566        productName = chr(self.bufferIn[10]) + chr(self.bufferIn[11]) + chr(self.bufferIn[12]) + \
 567                        chr(self.bufferIn[13]) + chr(self.bufferIn[14]) + chr(self.bufferIn[15]) + \
 568                        chr(self.bufferIn[16]) + chr(self.bufferIn[17]) + chr(self.bufferIn[18]) + \
 569                        chr(self.bufferIn[19]) + chr(self.bufferIn[20]) + chr(self.bufferIn[21]) + \
 570                        chr(self.bufferIn[22]) + chr(self.bufferIn[23]) + chr(self.bufferIn[24]) + \
 571                        chr(self.bufferIn[25]) + chr(self.bufferIn[26]) + chr(self.bufferIn[27]) + \
 572                        chr(self.bufferIn[28]) + chr(self.bufferIn[29]) + chr(self.bufferIn[30]) + \
 573                        chr(self.bufferIn[31]) + chr(self.bufferIn[32]) + chr(self.bufferIn[33]) + \
 574                        chr(self.bufferIn[34]) + chr(self.bufferIn[35]) + chr(self.bufferIn[36]) + \
 575                        chr(self.bufferIn[37]) + chr(self.bufferIn[39]) + chr(self.bufferIn[39])
 576        self.toolStripStatusLabel1.setText(productName + "Connected")
 577
 578        Image_System = self.bufferIn[8]
 579        match Image_System:
 580            case 0:
 581                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("Bootloader is active")
 582            case 1:
 583                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("FMHD is active")
 584            case 2:
 585                self.volume()
 586                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("DAB is active")
 587                # self.presetsButtonEnabled()
 588                self.pushButtonScan.setEnabled(True)
 589                self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(True)
 590                self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(True)
 591                self.checkBoxArtistTitle.setEnabled(True)
 592                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setEnabled(True)
 593                self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(True)
 594                # self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("Select a Service from the list")
 595
 596                # Load the Default Image ( 320x240 )
 597                pixmap = QPixmap("DAB_Default.jpg")
 598                self.labelPicture.setPixmap(pixmap)
 599                # Another
 600                for x in range(16):
 601                    self.bufferOut[x] = 0x00
 602                self.bufferOut[1] = 0x13    # Modify this property here to enable another PAD
 603                self.bufferOut[4] = 0xB4    # Property 0xB400. DAB_XPAD_ENABLE ( See AN649 )
 604                self.bufferOut[5] = 0x05    # 0x0005 : DLS and MOT SLS are enabled by default
 605                self.hidToSend = True
 606
 607            case 3:
 608                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("TDMB or data only DAB image is active")
 609            case 4:
 610                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("FMHD Demod is active")
 611            case 5:
 612                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("AMHD is active")
 613            case 6:
 614                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("AMHD Demod is active")
 615            case 7:
 616                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("FMHD is active")
 617            case 9:
 618                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("DAB Demod is active")
 619
 620    def firmwareRevision(self):
 621        """Provides the SI firmware and PIC firmware"""
 622        SI_First_Rev = str(self.bufferIn[8])
 623        SI_Second_Rev = str(self.bufferIn[9])
 624        SI_Third_Rev = str(self.bufferIn[10])
 625        PIC_First_Rev = str(self.bufferIn[16])
 626        PIC_Second_Rev = str(self.bufferIn[17])
 627        PIC_Third_Rev = str(self.bufferIn[18])
 628        firmwareText = " PIC Firmware revision : " + PIC_First_Rev + "." + PIC_Second_Rev + "." + PIC_Third_Rev + \
 629                       " / Si Firmware revision : " + SI_First_Rev + "." + SI_Second_Rev + "." + SI_Third_Rev
 630        self.toolStripStatusLabel4.setText(firmwareText)
 631
 632    def digitalServiceList(self):
 633        """Provides the Digital Service List"""
 634        serviceID = hex(self.bufferIn[15] * 16777216 + self.bufferIn[14] * 65536 + self.bufferIn[13] * 256 + self.bufferIn[12])
 635        serviceName = ""
 636        for index in range(20, 36):
 637            serviceName = serviceName + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[index]])
 638        componentID = hex(self.bufferIn[39] * 16777216 + self.bufferIn[38] * 65536 + self.bufferIn[37] * 256 + self.bufferIn[36])
 639        if self.bufferOut[1] == 0x40:
 640            self.nbServices += 1
 641            self.totalServices += 1
 642            self.my_array[self.currentTuneIndex][4] = self.nbServices
 643            self.service.lineEditNbServices.setText(str(self.totalServices))
 644        self.tableWidgetViewServices.insertRow(self.rowPosition)
 645        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 0, QTableWidgetItem("0"))
 646        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 1, QTableWidgetItem(serviceName))
 647        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 2, QTableWidgetItem(serviceID))
 648        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 3, QTableWidgetItem(componentID))
 649        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 4, QTableWidgetItem(str(self.currentTuneIndex)))
 650        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 5, QTableWidgetItem(str(self.currentTuneFrequency)))
 651        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 6, QTableWidgetItem(self.currentEID))
 652        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 7, QTableWidgetItem(self.currentComponentLabel))
 653
 654        self. rowPosition = self. rowPosition + 1
 655
 656    def readTableService(self, table):
 657        """
 658        Reads QTableWidget and return a dictionary of contents
 659        :param table: Tables of services
 660        """
 661        content = {}
 662        nbRow = self.tableWidgetViewServices.rowCount()
 663        print("Total Services 2: ", self.tableWidgetViewServices.rowCount())
 664        for row in range(nbRow):
 665            key = "service" + str(row + 1)
 666            service = {}
 667            for column in range(table.columnCount()):
 668                header = table.horizontalHeaderItem(column).text()
 669                item = table.item(row, column).text() if table.item(row, column) else ""
 670                service[header] = item
 671            content[key] = service
 672        return content
 673
 674    def saveServicesList(self):
 675        """Saves the services list into a new area json file"""
 676        area, ok = QInputDialog.getText(self , "Services List Save", "Enter the name of this area: ")
 677        if ok and area:
 678            fileName = "json/services-" + area.capitalize() + ".json"
 679            content = self.readTableService(self.tableWidgetViewServices)
 680            with open(fileName, "w", encoding='utf-8') as file:
 681                file.write(json.dumps(content, indent=4))
 682        else:
 683            pass
 684
 685    def dabDigradStatus(self):
 686        """Provides the DAB Digrad Status"""
 687        # Tune frequency and index
 688        self.currentTuneFrequency = (self.bufferIn[19] * 0x1000000) + (self.bufferIn[18] * 0x10000) + (self.bufferIn[17] * 0x100) + self.bufferIn[16]
 689        self.currentTuneIndex = self.bufferIn[20]
 690        self.my_array[self.currentTuneIndex][0] = self.currentTuneIndex
 691        self.my_array[self.currentTuneIndex][1] = self.currentTuneFrequency
 692
 693        # Analog or optical output
 694        if self.bufferIn[27] != self.jackStatus:
 695            self. jackStatus = self.bufferIn[27]
 696            match self.jackStatus:
 697                case 0x00:
 698                    self.labelOuput.setText("Analog Output")
 699                    self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(True)
 700                    self.labelVolume = self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.value().toString()
 701                    self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(True)
 702                    self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(True)
 703                case 0x02:
 704                    self.labelOuput.setText("Optical Output")
 705                    self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(False)
 706                    self.labelVolume = "0"
 707                    self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(False)
 708                    self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(True)
 709                case 0x03:
 710                    self.labelOuput.setText("")
 711                    self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(False)
 712                    self.labelVolume = "0"
 713                    self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(False)
 714                    self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(False)
 715
 716        if self.bufferIn[10] < 128:
 717            RSSI = self.bufferIn[10] & 0x3F
 718        else:
 719            RSSI = self.bufferIn[10] - 256
 720        self.my_array[self.currentTuneIndex][2] = RSSI
 721        valid = self.bufferIn[9] & 0x01
 722        self.my_array[self.currentTuneIndex][3] = valid
 723        SNR = self.bufferIn[11]
 724        CNR = self.bufferIn[13]
 725        FICQuality = self.bufferIn[12]
 726        self.nbServices = 0
 727        if self.bufferOut[1] != 0x40:
 728            self.labelRSSI.setText(str(RSSI) + " dB V")
 729            self.progressBarRSSI.setValue(RSSI)
 730            self.labelSNR.setText(str(SNR) + " dB")
 731            if SNR > 20:
 732                self.progressBarSNR.setValue(20)
 733            else:
 734                self.progressBarSNR.setValue(SNR)
 735            self.labelCNR.setText(str(CNR) + " dB")
 736            if CNR > 54 :
 737                self.progressBarCNR.setValue(54)
 738            else:
 739                self.progressBarCNR.setValue(CNR)
 740            self.labelFIC.setText(str(FICQuality))
 741            if FICQuality > 100 :
 742                self.progressBarFIC.setValue(100)
 743            else:
 744                self.progressBarFIC.setValue(FICQuality)
 745        self.service.setArray(self.my_array)
 746
 747        if self.bufferOut[1] == 0x40:
 748            self.service.progressBar.setValue(self.currentTuneIndex)
 749            self.service.labelScanning.setText("Scanning: " + str(self.currentTuneFrequency) + " Mhz")
 750            if self.currentTuneIndex == 39:
 751                self.service.labelScanning.setText("Scanning complete")
 752                self.service.pushButtonClose.setEnabled(True)
 753                if self.totalServices != 0:
 754                    self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("Select a Service from the list")
 755                    self.nbServices = self.totalServices
 756                else:
 757                    self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("No available service")
 758
 759    def ensembleInfo(self):
 760        """Provides the Ensemble Information"""
 761        self.currentEID = hex(self.bufferIn[8] * 256  + self.bufferIn[9])
 762        self.currentComponentLabel = ""
 763        for index in range(10, 26):
 764            self.currentComponentLabel = self.currentComponentLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[index]])
 765        # self.currentComponentLabel = chr(self.bufferIn[10]) + chr(self.bufferIn[11]) + chr(self.bufferIn[12]) \
 766        #                  + chr(self.bufferIn[13]) + chr(self.bufferIn[14]) + chr(self.bufferIn[15]) \
 767        #                  + chr(self.bufferIn[16]) + chr(self.bufferIn[17]) + chr(self.bufferIn[18]) \
 768        #                  + chr(self.bufferIn[19]) + chr(self.bufferIn[20]) + chr(self.bufferIn[21]) \
 769        #                  + chr(self.bufferIn[22]) + chr(self.bufferIn[23]) + chr(self.bufferIn[24]) \
 770        #                  + chr(self.bufferIn[25])
 771        # print("Component Label: ",self.currentComponentLabel)
 772
 773    def getDigitalServiceData(self):
 774        """Provides the Digital Service Data"""
 775        pictureName = ""
 776        self.packetIndex = self.bufferIn[6]
 777        if self.packetIndex == 0x00:
 778            self.PADDataType = self.bufferIn[11]
 779            match self.PADDataType:
 780                case 0x80:  # DLS
 781                    self.DLSType = self.bufferIn[28]
 782                    self.DLSLength = self.bufferIn[22] - 3
 783                    # print("DLSLength: ", '{:02X}'.format(self.DLSLength))
 784                    match self.DLSType:
 785                        case 0x00:  #  New DLS
 786                            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("")
 787                            self.lineEditTitle.setText("")
 788                            self.dynamicLabel = ""
 789                            if self.DLSLength > 9:
 790                                for var in range(30, 40):
 791                                    # Char  , , , , ,...OK ( &H7F to &HFF )
 792                                    self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 793                                self.DLSLength = self.DLSLength - 10
 794                            else:
 795                                for var in range(30, self.DLSLength + 30):
 796                                    # Char  , , , , ,...OK ( &H7F to &HFF )
 797                                    self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 798                            # self.timerArtistTitle.setInterval(100)
 799                            self.timerArtistTitle.start()
 800                        case 0x80:  # New DLS
 801                            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("")
 802                            self.lineEditTitle.setText("")
 803                            self.dynamicLabel = ""
 804                            if self.DLSLength > 9:
 805                                for var in range(30, 40):
 806                                    # Char  , , , , ,...OK ( &H7F to &HFF )
 807                                    self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 808                                self.DLSLength = self.DLSLength - 10
 809                            else:
 810                                for var in range(30, self.DLSLength + 30):
 811                                    # Char  , , , , ,...OK ( &H7F to &HFF )
 812                                    self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 813                            # self.timerArtistTitle.setInterval(100)
 814                            self.timerArtistTitle.start()
 815                        case 0x12:
 816                            # print("Case: ", 0x12)
 817                            if self.bufferIn[33] != 0x0 and self.bufferIn[35] != 0x0 and self.bufferIn[36] != 0x0:
 818                                titleLen = self.bufferIn[33] + 1
 819                                artistLen = self.bufferIn[36] + 1
 820                                artistIndex = self.bufferIn[35]
 821                                self.title = self.dynamicLabel[0: titleLen]
 822                                self.artist = self.dynamicLabel[artistIndex: (artistIndex + artistLen)]
 823                                self.lineEditTitle.setText("Title: " + self.title)
 824                                self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("Artist: " + self.artist)
 825                            else:
 826                                if self.checkBoxArtistTitle.isChecked():
 827                                    self.softLabelsArtistTitle()
 828                                else:
 829                                    self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText(self.dynamicLabel)
 830                        case 0x92:
 831                            if self.bufferIn[33] != 0x0 and self.bufferIn[35] != 0x0 and self.bufferIn[36] != 0x0:
 832                                titleLen = self.bufferIn[33] + 1
 833                                artistLen = self.bufferIn[36] + 1
 834                                artistIndex = self.bufferIn[35]
 835                                self.title = self.dynamicLabel[0: titleLen]
 836                                self.artist = self.dynamicLabel[artistIndex: (artistIndex + artistLen)]
 837                                self.lineEditTitle.setText("Title: " + self.title)
 838                                self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("Artist: " + self.artist)
 839                            else:
 840                                if self.checkBoxArtistTitle.isChecked():
 841                                    self.softLabelsArtistTitle()
 842                                else:
 843                                    self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText(self.dynamicLabel)
 844
 845                case 0x7C:
 846                    self.MOTSLSType = self.bufferIn[28]  # MOT SLS
 847                    self.SLSLength = self.bufferIn[35] * 256 + self.bufferIn[36]
 848                    match self.MOTSLSType:
 849                        case 0x73:  # Image Name
 850                            self.lineEditPictureName.setText("")
 851                        case 0x74:  # Image
 852                            result = []
 853                            indexImage = 0
 854                            if self.imageStart: # TRUE
 855                                indexImage = self.bufferIn[31] + 1
 856                                self.lineEditPacket.setText(str(indexImage))
 857                                for k in range(37, 40):
 858                                    result.append(self.bufferIn[k])
 859                                self.pictureByte = self.pictureByte.append(bytes(result))
 860                                self.SLSLength = self.SLSLength - 3
 861        else:
 862            self.payloadLength = self.bufferIn[7]
 863            match self.PADDataType:
 864                case 0x80:
 865                    if self.payloadLength > 1:
 866                        match self.DLSType:
 867                            case 0x00:
 868                                if self.DLSLength > 32:
 869                                    for var in range(8, 40):
 870                                        self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 871                                    self.DLSLength = self.DLSLength - 32
 872                                else:
 873                                    for var in range(8, self.DLSLength + 8):
 874                                        self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 875                            case 0x80:
 876                                if self.DLSLength > 32:
 877                                    for var in range(8, 40):
 878                                        self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 879                                    self.DLSLength = self.DLSLength - 32
 880                                else:
 881                                    for var in range(8, self.DLSLength + 8):
 882                                        self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 883                case 0x7C:
 884                    if self.payloadLength > 2:
 885                        match self.MOTSLSType:
 886                            case 0x73:
 887                                for var in range(20, 28):
 888                                    pictureName = pictureName + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 889                                self.lineEditPictureName.setText(pictureName)
 890                                if pictureName != "":
 891                                    if self.saveImage:
 892                                        self.pictureFile = pictureName
 893                                        self.labelSavedImage.setText("* The last saved image: " + pictureName + " *")
 894                                    else:
 895                                        self.pictureFile = "picture.jpg"
 896                                    self.loadingPicture3()
 897                                self.imageStart = True
 898                            case 0x74:
 899                                if self.imageStart:
 900                                    result = []
 901                                    if self.SLSLength > 32:
 902                                        for k in range(8, 40):
 903                                            result.append(self.bufferIn[k])
 904                                        self.pictureByte = self.pictureByte.append(bytes(result))
 905                                        self.SLSLength = self.SLSLength - 32
 906                                    else:
 907                                        for k in range(8, self.SLSLength + 8):
 908                                            result.append(self.bufferIn[k])
 909                                        self.pictureByte = self.pictureByte.append(bytes(result))
 910
 911    def timerArtistTitleTick(self):
 912        """Timer Artist Title Tick"""
 913        self.timerArtistTitle.stop()
 914        if self.checkBoxArtistTitle.isChecked():
 915            self.softLabelsArtistTitle()
 916        else:
 917            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText(self.dynamicLabel)
 918
 919    def softLabelsArtistTitle(self):
 920        """Displays the labels artist title."""
 921        dlsLen = len(self.dynamicLabel)
 922        charPosition = self.dynamicLabel.find(" - ", 0, dlsLen)
 923        if charPosition != 0:
 924            self.title = self.dynamicLabel[0: charPosition]
 925            self.artist = self.dynamicLabel[charPosition + 2: dlsLen]
 926            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText(self.artist)
 927            self.lineEditTitle.setText(self.title)
 928        else:
 929            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText(self.dynamicLabel)
 930
 931    def loadingPicture3(self):
 932        """Loads a image new method."""
 933        if self.pictureByte:
 934            self.imageStart = False
 935            picturePath = Path('.').resolve() / "Images" / self.pictureFile
 936            self.fileJPG = open(picturePath, "wb")
 937            self.fileJPG.write(bytes(self.pictureByte))
 938            self.fileJPG.close()
 939            pixmap = QPixmap(picturePath)
 940            self.labelPicture.setPixmap(pixmap)
 941            self.pictureByte.clear()
 942
 943    def saveImageEnable(self):
 944        """Current image can be saved"""
 945        if self.saveImage:
 946            self.saveImage = False
 947        else:
 948            self.saveImage = True
 949
 950    def dabGetTime(self):
 951        """Provides DAB time and date Information (case response 0xBC)."""
 952        year = self.bufferIn[9] * 256 + self.bufferIn[8]
 953        months = self.bufferIn[10]
 954        days = self.bufferIn[11]
 955        hours = self.bufferIn[12]
 956        minutes = self.bufferIn[13]
 957        seconds = self.bufferIn[14]
 958        date = QDate(year, months, days).toString("d MMMM yyyy")
 959        time = QTime(hours, minutes, seconds).toString()
 960        dateTime = "Date: " + date + "  Time: " + time
 961        self.lineEditDateTime.setText(dateTime)
 962
 963    def dabGetAudioInfo(self):
 964        """Provides DAB Audio Information (case response 0xBD)."""
 965        bitRate = self.bufferIn[9] * 256 + self.bufferIn[8]
 966        self.labelBitRate.setText("Bit Rate: " + str(bitRate) + " kbps")
 967        sampleRate = (self.bufferIn[11] * 256 + self.bufferIn[10]) / 1000
 968        self.labelSampleRate.setText("Sample Rate: " + str(sampleRate) + " kHz")
 969
 970    def dabGetServiceInfo(self):
 971        """Provides DAB service information (case response  0xC0)."""
 972        currentService = chr(self.bufferIn[12]) + chr(self.bufferIn[13]) + chr(self.bufferIn[14]) \
 973                         + chr(self.bufferIn[15]) + chr(self.bufferIn[16]) + chr(self.bufferIn[17]) \
 974                         + chr(self.bufferIn[18]) + chr(self.bufferIn[19]) + chr(self.bufferIn[20]) \
 975                         + chr(self.bufferIn[21]) + chr(self.bufferIn[22]) + chr(self.bufferIn[23]) \
 976                         + chr(self.bufferIn[24]) + chr(self.bufferIn[25]) + chr(self.bufferIn[26]) \
 977                         + chr(self.bufferIn[27]) + chr(self.bufferIn[27])
 978        self.lineEditCurrentService.setText(currentService)
 979
 980    def tuningForNewEnsemble(self):
 981        """Tuning For New Ensemble"""
 982        self.progressBarRSSI.setValue(0)
 983        self.progressBarSNR.setValue(0)
 984        self.progressBarCNR.setValue(0)
 985        self.progressBarFIC.setValue(0)
 986        self.labelRSSI.setText("00 dB V")
 987        self.labelSNR.setText("00 DB")
 988        self.labelCNR.setText("00 dB")
 989        self.labelFIC.setText("000")
 990        self.labelBitRate.setText("Bit Rate: ")
 991        self.labelSampleRate.setText("Sample Rate: ")
 992        self.ensemble.show()
 993        self.ensemble.setLabel("Tuning for a new ensemble")
 994        self.ensemble.setProgressBarValue(0)
 995        self.timerNewEnsemble.start(300) # Starts updating the ensemble panel with a progress bar
 996                                         # that advances by 10% after 300 ms
 997                                         # and closes at the end
 998
 999    def timerNewEnsembleTick(self):
1000        """Timer New Ensemble Tick"""
1001        if self.ensemble.getProgressBarValue() == 100:
1002            self.timerNewEnsemble.stop()
1003            self.ensemble.close()
1004        else:
1005            newValue = self.ensemble.getProgressBarValue() + 10
1006            self.ensemble.setProgressBarValue(newValue)
1007
1008
1009    def loadServices(self):
1010        """Loads Services"""
1011        if self.nbServices != 0 :
1012            for row in range(0, self.nbServices):
1013                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 0, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].preset))
1014                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 1, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].serviceName))
1015                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 2, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].serviceID))
1016                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 3, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].componentID))
1017                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 4, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].tuneIndex))
1018                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 5, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].tuneFrequency))
1019                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 6, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].EID))
1020                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 7, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].componentLabel))
1021            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("Select a Service from the list")
1022        else :
1023            msgBox3 = QMessageBox()
1024            msgBox3.setWindowTitle("DAB WARNING")
1025            msgBox3.setText("Services list is empty : scan for services")
1026            msgBox3.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok)
1027            if msgBox3.exec() == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok:
1028                pass
1029            else:
1030                pass
1031
1032    def dataGridViewServicesCellClick(self):
1033        """
1034        Data Grid View Services Cell Click
1035        Set Data Services
1036        return: row
1037        """
1038        row = self.tableWidgetViewServices.currentRow()
1039        self.currentIndex = row
1040        self.startService()
1041
1042    def startService(self):
1043        """Starts the selected service on data grid panel or presets panel"""
1044        row = self.currentIndex
1045        self.bufferOut[1] = 0x81
1046        self.bufferOut[2] = 0x00
1047        tuneIndex = int(self.services[row].tuneIndex)
1048        self.bufferOut[3] = tuneIndex
1049        self.bufferOut[4] = 0x00
1050
1051        serviceID = int(self.services[row].serviceID, 16)
1052        self.bufferOut[5] = serviceID & 255
1053        self.bufferOut[6] = int((serviceID & 65280) / 256)
1054        self.bufferOut[7] = int((serviceID & 16711680) / 65536)
1055        self.bufferOut[8] = int((serviceID & 4278190080) / 16777216)
1056
1057        componentID = int(self.services[row].componentID, 16)
1058        self.bufferOut[9] = componentID & 255
1059        self.bufferOut[10] = int((componentID & 65280) / 256)
1060        self.bufferOut[11] = int((componentID & 16711680) / 65536)
1061        self.bufferOut[12] = int((componentID & 4278190080) / 16777216)
1062
1063        self.bufferOut[13] = 0x00
1064        self.bufferOut[14] = 0x00
1065        self.bufferOut[15] = 0x00
1066
1067        self.hidToSend = True
1068        self.hidSendCheck()
1069
1070    def buttonScanClick(self):
1071        """Scans for available DAB+ radio stations.
1072        """
1073        self.tableWidgetViewServices.clear()
1074        headerH = ['Preset','Service Name', 'Service ID', 'Component ID', 'Tune Index', 'Tune Frequency kHz', 'EID',
1075                   'Component Label']
1076        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setHorizontalHeaderLabels(headerH)
1077
1078        self.nbServices = 0
1079        self.totalServices = 0
1080        self.progressBarRSSI.setValue(0)
1081        self.progressBarSNR.setValue(0)
1082        self.progressBarCNR.setValue(0)
1083        self.progressBarFIC.setValue(0)
1084        self.labelRSSI.setText("00 dBµV")
1085        self.labelSNR.setText("00 dB")
1086        self.labelCNR.setText("00 dB")
1087        self.labelFIC.setText("000")
1088        self.labelBitRate.setText("Bit Rate: ")
1089        self.labelSampleRate.setText("Sample Rate: ")
1090        self.bufferOut[0] = 0x00
1091        self.bufferOut[1] = 0x40
1092        self.bufferOut[2] = 0x01
1093        self.bufferOut[3] = 0x00
1094        self.bufferOut[4] = 0x00
1095        self.bufferOut[5] = 0x00
1096        self.bufferOut[6] = 0x00
1097        self.bufferOut[7] = 0x00
1098        self.bufferOut[8] = 0x00
1099        self.bufferOut[9] = 0x00
1100        self.bufferOut[10] = 0x00
1101        self.bufferOut[11] = 0x00
1102        self.bufferOut[12] = 0x00
1103        self.bufferOut[13] = 0x00
1104        self.bufferOut[14] = 0x00
1105        self.bufferOut[15] = 0x00
1106        self.service.show()
1107        self.service.labelScanning.setText("running ...")
1108        self.service.tableWidgetService.clearContents()
1109        self.service.pushButtonClose.setEnabled(False)
1110        self.hidToSend = True
1111        self.hidSendCheck()
1112
1113# PRESETS DAB+ RADIO
1114    def presetsButtonDisabled(self):
1115        """All presets buttons are disabled"""
1116        self.pushButtonPreset1.setEnabled(False)
1117        self.pushButtonPreset2.setEnabled(False)
1118        self.pushButtonPreset3.setEnabled(False)
1119        self.pushButtonPreset4.setEnabled(False)
1120        self.pushButtonPreset5.setEnabled(False)
1121        self.pushButtonPreset6.setEnabled(False)
1122        self.pushButtonPreset7.setEnabled(False)
1123        self.pushButtonPreset8.setEnabled(False)
1124        self.pushButtonPreset9.setEnabled(False)
1125        self.pushButtonPreset10.setEnabled(False)
1126        self.pushButtonPreset11.setEnabled(False)
1127        self.pushButtonPreset12.setEnabled(False)
1128
1129    def presetsButtonEnabled(self):
1130        """All presets buttons are enabled"""
1131        self.pushButtonPreset1.setEnabled(True)
1132        self.pushButtonPreset2.setEnabled(True)
1133        self.pushButtonPreset3.setEnabled(True)
1134        self.pushButtonPreset4.setEnabled(True)
1135        self.pushButtonPreset5.setEnabled(True)
1136        self.pushButtonPreset6.setEnabled(True)
1137        self.pushButtonPreset7.setEnabled(True)
1138        self.pushButtonPreset8.setEnabled(True)
1139        self.pushButtonPreset9.setEnabled(True)
1140        self.pushButtonPreset10.setEnabled(True)
1141        self.pushButtonPreset11.setEnabled(True)
1142        self.pushButtonPreset12.setEnabled(True)
1143
1144    def buttonMemoryClick(self):
1145        """ If pushButton is clicked, a new Presets list must be modified"""
1146        if self.memory == False:
1147            self.memory = True
1148            self.resetPresets()
1149        else:
1150            self.memory = False
1151
1152    def resetPresets(self):
1153        """Resets all presets and allows you to modify the list of presets"""
1154        msgBox6 = QMessageBox()
1155        msgBox6.setWindowTitle("DAB WARNING")
1156        msgBox6.setText('You can modify the list and order of the presets in the "Services List" table (under the "Presets" column): 0 indicates the selected preset, while 1, 2, 3, etc., determine the preset order. To apply the changes, click "Save this services list," then click "Off" followed by "On" to refresh the presets.')
1157        msgBox6.setInformativeText("Are you sure?")
1158        msgBox6.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Yes | QMessageBox.StandardButton.No)
1159        answer = msgBox6.exec()
1160        if answer == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Yes:
1161            # self.buttonPresetNoClicked()
1162            self.presetsButtonDisabled()
1163            self.pushButtonMemory.setEnabled(False)
1164        if answer == QMessageBox.StandardButton.No:
1165            pass
1166
1167    def loadPresets(self):
1168        """Loads all presets"""
1169        self.pushButtonMemory.setEnabled(True)
1170        for index in range(self.nbPresets):
1171            match index:
1172                case 0:
1173                    self.pushButtonPreset1.setText(self.presets[0].serviceName.strip())
1174                    self.pushButtonPreset1.setEnabled(True)
1175                case 1:
1176                    self.pushButtonPreset2.setText(self.presets[1].serviceName.strip())
1177                    self.pushButtonPreset2.setEnabled(True)
1178                case 2:
1179                    self.pushButtonPreset3.setText(self.presets[2].serviceName.strip())
1180                    self.pushButtonPreset3.setEnabled(True)
1181                case 3:
1182                    self.pushButtonPreset4.setText(self.presets[3].serviceName.strip())
1183                    self.pushButtonPreset4.setEnabled(True)
1184                case 4:
1185                    self.pushButtonPreset5.setText(self.presets[4].serviceName.strip())
1186                    self.pushButtonPreset5.setEnabled(True)
1187                case 5:
1188                    self.pushButtonPreset6.setText(self.presets[5].serviceName.strip())
1189                    self.pushButtonPreset6.setEnabled(True)
1190                case 6:
1191                    self.pushButtonPreset7.setText(self.presets[6].serviceName.strip())
1192                    self.pushButtonPreset7.setEnabled(True)
1193                case 7:
1194                    self.pushButtonPreset8.setText(self.presets[7].serviceName.strip())
1195                    self.pushButtonPreset8.setEnabled(True)
1196                case 8:
1197                    self.pushButtonPreset9.setText(self.presets[8].serviceName.strip())
1198                    self.pushButtonPreset9.setEnabled(True)
1199                case 9:
1200                    self.pushButtonPreset10.setText(self.presets[9].serviceName.strip())
1201                    self.pushButtonPreset10.setEnabled(True)
1202                case 10:
1203                    self.pushButtonPreset11.setText(self.presets[10].serviceName.strip())
1204                    self.pushButtonPreset11.setEnabled(True)
1205                case 11:
1206                    self.pushButtonPreset12.setText(self.presets[11].serviceName.strip())
1207                    self.pushButtonPreset12.setEnabled(True)
1208                case _:
1209                    pass
1210
1211    def savePresetsMark(self):
1212        """Saves Presets marks into json Services File"""
1213        # Creating the json object
1214        settings = {}
1215        for row in range(0, self.nbServices):
1216            preset = self.services[row].preset
1217            serviceName = self.services[row].serviceName
1218            serviceId = self.services[row].serviceID
1219            componentID = self.services[row].componentID
1220            tuneIndex = self.services[row].tuneIndex
1221            tuneFrequency = self.services[row].tuneFrequency
1222            EID = self.services[row].EID
1223            componentLabel = self.services[row].componentLabel
1224            serviceIndex = "service" + str(row + 1)
1225            serviceDict = {
1226                "preset": preset,
1227                "serviceName": serviceName,
1228                "serviceID": serviceId,
1229                "componentID": componentID,
1230                "tuneIndex": tuneIndex,
1231                "tuneFrequency": tuneFrequency,
1232                "EID": EID,
1233                "componentLabel": componentLabel
1234            }
1235            settings[serviceIndex] = serviceDict
1236        # Serializing Json
1237        json_object = json.dumps(settings, indent=7)
1238
1239        # Updating or creating the json file
1240        file_name, _ = QFileDialog.getSaveFileName(self, "Save Services json File", "", "Json Files (*.json)")
1241        if file_name:
1242            try:
1243                with open(file_name, 'w') as file:
1244                    file.write(json_object)  # json file
1245            except Exception as e:
1246                pass
1247
1248    def buttonPresetNoClicked(self):
1249    #     """Makes all the buttons Enable style"""
1250        styleButton = 'QPushButton {background-color: qlineargradient(spread:repeat, x1:1, y1:0, x2:1, y2:1, stop:0 rgba(84, 84, 84, 255),stop:1 rgba(59, 59, 59, 255)); \
1251        min-width: 30px; border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; border-radius: 3px; border-color: #051a39; padding: 3px;}'
1252
1253        self.pushButtonPreset1.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1254        self.pushButtonPreset2.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1255        self.pushButtonPreset3.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1256        self.pushButtonPreset4.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1257        self.pushButtonPreset5.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1258        self.pushButtonPreset6.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1259        self.pushButtonPreset7.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1260        self.pushButtonPreset8.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1261        self.pushButtonPreset9.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1262        self.pushButtonPreset10.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1263        self.pushButtonPreset11.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1264        self.pushButtonPreset12.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1265
1266    def buttonPresetClick(self, index):
1267        """Selects a favorite (preset).
1268        :param index: index of the chosen favorite.
1269        """
1270        self.buttonPresetNoClicked()
1271        match index:
1272            case 0:
1273                self.pushButtonPreset1.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1274                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1275                print(serviceID)
1276                self.favorite(serviceID)
1277            case 1:
1278                self.pushButtonPreset2.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1279                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1280                self.favorite(serviceID)
1281            case 2:
1282                self.pushButtonPreset3.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1283                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1284                self.favorite(serviceID)
1285            case 3:
1286                self.pushButtonPreset4.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1287                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1288                self.favorite(serviceID)
1289            case 4:
1290                self.pushButtonPreset5.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1291                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1292                self.favorite(serviceID)
1293            case 5:
1294                self.pushButtonPreset6.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1295                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1296                self.favorite(serviceID)
1297            case 6:
1298                self.pushButtonPreset7.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1299                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1300                self.favorite(serviceID)
1301            case 7:
1302                self.pushButtonPreset8.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1303                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1304                self.favorite(serviceID)
1305            case 8:
1306                self.pushButtonPreset9.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1307                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1308                self.favorite(serviceID)
1309            case 9:
1310                self.pushButtonPreset10.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1311                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1312                self.favorite(serviceID)
1313            case 10:
1314                self.pushButtonPreset11.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1315                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1316                self.favorite(serviceID)
1317            case 11:
1318                self.pushButtonPreset12.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1319                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1320                self.favorite(serviceID)
1321
1322    def favorite(self, serviceID):
1323        """Searches this preset in the services list and start this service."""
1324        self.nbServices = len(self.services)
1325        self.currentIndex = 0
1326        if self.nbServices != 0 :
1327            for row in range(0, self.nbServices):
1328                if self.services[row].serviceID == serviceID :
1329                    self.currentIndex = row
1330            self.startService()
1331
1332    def checkBoxArtistTitleClick(self):
1333        """The artist's name is displayed separately or not."""
1334        if self.checkBoxArtistTitle.isChecked():
1335            self.softLabelsArtistTitle()
1336        else:
1337            self.lineEditTitle.setText("")
1338            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText(self.dynamicLabel)
1339
1340    def checkBoxMuteClick(self):
1341        """Selects whether to use silent mode."""
1342        self.bufferOut[0] = 0x00
1343        self.bufferOut[1] = 0x13
1344        self.bufferOut[2] = 0x00
1345        self.bufferOut[3] = 0x01
1346        self.bufferOut[4] = 0x03
1347        if self.checkBoxMute.isChecked():
1348            self.bufferOut[5] = 0x03
1349        else:
1350            self.bufferOut[5] = 0x00
1351        self.bufferOut[6] = 0x00
1352        self.bufferOut[7] = 0x00
1353        self.bufferOut[8] = 0x00
1354        self.bufferOut[9] = 0x00
1355        self.bufferOut[10] = 0x00
1356        self.bufferOut[11] = 0x00
1357        self.bufferOut[12] = 0x00
1358        self.bufferOut[13] = 0x00
1359        self.bufferOut[14] = 0x00
1360        self.bufferOut[15] = 0x00
1361        self.hidToSend = True
1362        self.hidSendCheck()
1363
1364    def checkBoxMonoClick(self):
1365        """Selects Mono or Stereo mode."""
1366        self.bufferOut[0] = 0x00
1367        self.bufferOut[1] = 0x13
1368        self.bufferOut[2] = 0x00
1369        self.bufferOut[3] = 0x02  # Property 0x0302. AUDIO_OUTPUT_CONFIG
1370        self.bufferOut[4] = 0x03
1371        if self.checkBoxMono.isChecked():
1372            self.bufferOut[5] = 0x01
1373        else:
1374            self.bufferOut[5] = 0x00
1375        self.bufferOut[6] = 0x00
1376        self.bufferOut[7] = 0x00
1377        self.bufferOut[8] = 0x00
1378        self.bufferOut[9] = 0x00
1379        self.bufferOut[10] = 0x00
1380        self.bufferOut[11] = 0x00
1381        self.bufferOut[12] = 0x00
1382        self.bufferOut[13] = 0x00
1383        self.bufferOut[14] = 0x00
1384        self.bufferOut[15] = 0x00
1385        self.hidToSend = True
1386        self.hidSendCheck()
1387
1388    def hScrollBarVolumeValueChanged(self):
1389        """
1390        When the volume's scrollbar changes, the volume is modified.
1391        """
1392        self.volume()
1393
1394    def volume(self):
1395        """
1396        Changes the volume.
1397        """
1398        # self.labelVolume = str(self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.value())
1399        self.bufferOut[0] = 0x00
1400        self.bufferOut[1] = 0x13
1401        self.bufferOut[2] = 0x00
1402        self.bufferOut[3] = 0x00
1403        self.bufferOut[4] = 0x03  # Property 0x0300. AUDIO_ANALOG_VOLUME
1404        self.bufferOut[5] = self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.value()
1405        self.bufferOut[6] = 0x00
1406        self.bufferOut[7] = 0x00
1407        self.bufferOut[8] = 0x00
1408        self.bufferOut[9] = 0x00
1409        self.bufferOut[10] = 0x00
1410        self.bufferOut[11] = 0x00
1411        self.bufferOut[12] = 0x00
1412        self.bufferOut[13] = 0x00
1413        self.bufferOut[14] = 0x00
1414        self.bufferOut[15] = 0x00
1415        self.hidToSend = True
1416        self.hidSendCheck()
1417
1418    def hidSendCheck(self):
1419        """
1420        Timer HID Send Tick
1421        """
1422        if self.hidToSend:  # True
1423            self.hidSend()
1424            if self.bufferOut[1] == 0x81:
1425                # Image clear
1426                self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("")
1427                self.lineEditTitle.setText("")
1428                self.lineEditPictureName.setText("")
1429                self.lineEditPacket.setText("")
1430                self.lineEditCurrentService.setText("")
1431                self.lineEditDateTime.setText("")
1432                self.labelBitRate.setText("Bit Rate : ")
1433                self.labelSampleRate.setText("Sample Rate : ")
1434                self.imageStart = False
1435                self.pictureByte.clear()
1436        else:
1437            self.hidToSend = False
1438
1439    def hidSend(self):
1440    # def hidSend(self, dataOut=b"\x00"):
1441        """Sends a command for the USB HID device
1442        HID Send
1443        dataOut: byte, command to the device
1444        """
1445        Out = ' '.join('{:02X}'.format(a) for a in self.bufferOut)
1446        self.lineEditBufferOut.setText(Out)
1447        # dataOut=b"\x00 ...
1448        dataOut = bytes(bytearray(self.bufferOut))
1449
1450        try:
1451            res1 = self.myDevice.write(dataOut)
1452            dataOutStr = ""
1453            for data in dataOut:
1454                dataOutStr += str("{0:02X}".format(data)) + " "
1455        except UsbHidIOError:
1456            msgBox = QMessageBox()
1457            msgBox.setWindowTitle("Message")
1458            msgBox.setText("Writing error")
1459            msgBox.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel)
1460            msgBox.setDefaultButton(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel)
1461            answer = msgBox.exec()
1462            if answer == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel:
1463                pass
1464
1465def loadStyleSheet(app, qssFile):
1466    """Loads the qss file that defines the application style."""
1467    file = QFile(qssFile)
1468    if file.open(QIODevice.OpenModeFlag.ReadOnly | QIODevice.OpenModeFlag.Text):
1469        styleSheet = file.readAll().data().decode("utf-8")
1470        app.setStyleSheet(styleSheet)
1471
1472
1473def main():
1474    """Main program"""
1475    app = QApplication(sys.argv)
1476
1477    # Load the Combinear.qss style sheet
1478    loadStyleSheet(app, "qss/Combinear.qss")
1479
1480    window = Dab()
1481    window.show()
1482    sys.exit(app.exec())
1483
1484
1485if __name__ == "__main__":
1486    main()
class Communicate(PySide6.QtCore.QObject): 
42class Communicate(QObject):
43    updateDisplay = Signal(int)

QObject(self, /, parent: Optional[PySide6.QtCore.QObject] = None, *, objectName: Optional[str] = None) -> None

def updateDisplay(unknown):

The type of the None singleton.

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("Communicate" inherits "QObject": Methods: #4 type=Signal, signature=updateDisplay(int), parameters=int )
def checkDevice(): 
45def checkDevice():
46    """Checks the device on Linux or Windows platform."""
47    if platform.system() == "Linux" or platform.system() == "Windows":
48        try:
49            device = hid.Device(vid=VENDOR_ID, pid=PRODUCT_ID)
50            return device
51        except HIDException as e:
52            if platform.system() == "Linux":
53                try:
54                    res = hid.enumerate(vid=VENDOR_ID, pid=PRODUCT_ID)
55                    dict1 = res[0]
56                    hidPath = dict1["path"].decode()
57                    msgBox1 = QMessageBox()
58                    msgBox1.setWindowTitle("DEVICE ERROR")
59                    msgBox1.setText("Permission denied")
60                    msgBox1.setInformativeText("Plug your Device and give permission\n sudo chmod 0666 " + hidPath)
61                    msgBox1.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok)
62                    if msgBox1.exec() == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok:
63                        exit()
64                    else:
65                        pass
66                except HIDException as e:
67                    msgBox3 = QMessageBox()
68                    msgBox3.setWindowTitle("DEVICE ERROR")
69                    msgBox3.setText("Device no found")
70                    msgBox3.setInformativeText("Plug your device:" + e)
71                    msgBox3.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok)
72                    if msgBox3.exec() == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok:
73                        exit()
74                    else:
75                        pass
76            else:
77                msgBox2 = QMessageBox()
78                msgBox2.setWindowTitle("DEVICE ERROR")
79                msgBox2.setText("Device no found")
80                msgBox2.setInformativeText("Plug your device !")
81                msgBox2.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok)
82                if msgBox2.exec() == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok:
83                    exit()
84                else:
85                    pass

Checks the device on Linux or Windows platform.

def serviceListNotAvailable(): 
88def serviceListNotAvailable():
89    """Displays in a popup that the service list is not available(case response is 0xFF)."""
90    msgBox4 = QMessageBox()
91    msgBox4.setWindowTitle("DAB ERROR")
92    msgBox4.setText("Service List is not available !!!")
93    msgBox4.setInformativeText("Check your antenna or start a new scan.")
94    msgBox4.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok)
95    if msgBox4.exec() == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok:
96        pass
97    else:
98        pass

Displays in a popup that the service list is not available(case response is 0xFF).

class Dab(PySide6.QtWidgets.QMainWindow, MainWindow.Ui_Form): 
 101class Dab(QMainWindow, Ui_Form):
 102    """DAB Radio panel (creating and playing)"""
 103
 104    def __init__(self):
 105        """Initializes the MainWindow class"""
 106        super().__init__()
 107
 108        # ---INIT PANEL ---
 109        # Creating main window from dab.ui / dab.py
 110        self.setupUi(self)
 111        self.setWindowIcon(QIcon("radio.png"))
 112        self.setWindowTitle("RADIO DAB")
 113
 114        # --- INIT SOME VARIABLE ---
 115        # Read and write buffers
 116        self.bufferIn = [0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
 117                         0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
 118                         0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00]
 119        """
 120        IN -> Read from the Device
 121        Received data will be stored here - the first byte in the array is unused
 122        bufferInSize = 40  -> Size of the data buffer coming IN to the PC
 123        """
 124        self.bufferOut = [0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
 125                          0x00]
 126        """
 127        OUT -> Write to the device
 128        Transmitted data is stored here - the first item in the array must be 0
 129        bufferOutSize = 16  -> Size of the data buffer going OUT from the PC
 130        """
 131
 132        #  Creating list of services
 133        self.nbServices = 0
 134        self.services = []
 135        self.currentIndex = 0
 136        self.totalServices = 0
 137        self.tuneIndex = 0
 138        self.rowPosition = 0
