 139        self.currentTuneIndex = 0
 140        self.currentTuneFrequency = 0
 141        self.currentEID = 0x00
 142        self.currentComponentLabel = ""
 143
 144        #  Creating list of presets
 145        self.nbPresets = 0
 146        self.presets = []
 147
 148        self.hidToSend = False
 149
 150        # Init Status Bar
 151        self.dynamicLabel = "Alain is - the best"
 152        self.artist = ""
 153        self.title = ""
 154
 155        self.packetIndex = 0
 156        self.PADDataType = 0
 157        self.DLSType = 0
 158        self.MOTSLSType = 0
 159        self.DLSLength = 0
 160        self.SLSLength = 0
 161        self.payloadLength = 0
 162
 163        self.jackStatus = 0x00
 164        """Analog or Optical output"""
 165        self.labelVolume = "0"
 166
 167        # Init Picture
 168        self.imageStart = False
 169        """Beginning for load the picture""" 
 170        self.pathPicture = ""
 171        """Path of the picture"""
 172        self.pictureByte = QByteArray()
 173        """Content of the picture in Byte format"""
 174        self.pictureFile = "picture.jpg"
 175        """Picture name for init"""
 176        self.pictureResult = []
 177        """Content array of the picture"""
 178        self.fileJPG = QFile
 179        """File for load Image"""
 180        self.saveImage = False
 181
 182        # --- INIT DEVICE ---
 183        self.myDevice = checkDevice()
 184
 185        # --- INIT SOME WIDGET ---
 186        self.pushButtonOn.setEnabled(True)
 187        self.pushButtonOff.setEnabled(False)
 188        self.pushButtonScan.setEnabled(False)
 189        self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(False)
 190        self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(False)
 191        self.checkBoxArtistTitle.setEnabled(False)
 192        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setEnabled(False)
 193        self.pushButtonSaveList.setEnabled(False)
 194        self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(False)
 195        self.checkBoxSaveImage.setEnabled(False)
 196        self.presetsButtonDisabled()
 197
 198        self.toolStripStatusLabel1.setText("DAB Tuner not connected")
 199        self.toolStripStatusLabel2.setText("")
 200        self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("")
 201        self.toolStripStatusLabel4.setText("")
 202
 203        self.bufferAddress = [0x00, 0x01, 0x02, 0x03, 0x04, 0x05, 0x06, 0x07, 0x08, 0x09, 0x10, 0x11, 0x012,
 204                              0x13, 0x14, 0x15, 0x16, 0x17, 0x18, 0x19, 0x20, 0x21, 0x22, 0x23, 0x24, 0x25,
 205                              0x26, 0x27, 0x28, 0x29, 0x30, 0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34, 0x35, 0x36, 0x37, 0x38,
 206                              0x39]
 207
 208        self.dataAddress = ' '.join('{:02X}'.format(a) for a in self.bufferAddress)
 209        self.lineEditAddress.setText(self.dataAddress)
 210
 211        self.led = QLed()
 212        self.layoutPower.insertWidget(0, self.led)
 213
 214        self.image = QPixmap()
 215
 216        self.service = TableService()
 217
 218        self.ensemble = Ensemble()
 219        # For scanning, create a tab :
 220        # row -> tune index
 221        # column -> 0: tune index, 1: frequency, 2: RSSI, 3: valid, 4: nb services
 222        self.my_array = [[0 for col in range(5)] for row in range(41)]
 223        headerH = ['Preset','Service Name', 'Service ID', 'Component ID', 'Tune Index', 'Tune Frequency kHz', 'EID',
 224                   'Component Label', ]
 225        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setHorizontalHeaderLabels(headerH)
 226
 227        # --- INIT CONNECTIONS ---
 228        self.pushButtonOn.clicked.connect(self.on)
 229        self.pushButtonOff.clicked.connect(self.off)
 230        self.pushButtonScan.clicked.connect(self.buttonScanClick)
 231
 232        self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.valueChanged.connect(self.hScrollBarVolumeValueChanged)
 233
 234        self.tableWidgetViewServices.clicked.connect(self.dataGridViewServicesCellClick)
 235
 236        self.checkBoxMono.clicked.connect(self.checkBoxMonoClick)
 237        self.checkBoxMute.clicked.connect(self.checkBoxMuteClick)
 238
 239        self.comboBoxAreas.addItems(["Default Area"])
 240        self.comboBoxAreas.setCurrentText("Default Area")
 241
 242        self.checkBoxSaveImage.clicked.connect(self.saveImageEnable)
 243
 244        self.memory = False
 245        self.pushButtonMemory.clicked.connect(self.buttonMemoryClick)
 246
 247        # Find the different Services list (json files in json directory)
 248        # and add this services list in Areas comboBx
 249        self.getServicesFile()
 250        self.pushButtonSaveList.clicked.connect(self.saveServicesList)
 251
 252        # --- PUSH BUTTON PRESETS ---
 253
 254        self.pushButtonPreset1.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(0))
 255        self.pushButtonPreset2.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(1))
 256        self.pushButtonPreset3.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(2))
 257        self.pushButtonPreset4.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(3))
 258        self.pushButtonPreset5.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(4))
 259        self.pushButtonPreset6.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(5))
 260        self.pushButtonPreset7.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(6))
 261        self.pushButtonPreset8.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(7))
 262        self.pushButtonPreset9.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(8))
 263        self.pushButtonPreset10.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(9))
 264        self.pushButtonPreset11.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(10))
 265        self.pushButtonPreset12.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(11))
 266
 267        # --- CHECK SOME FUNCTION
 268        # self.pushButtonTest4.clicked.connect(self.timer4Tick)
 269
 270        self.com = Communicate()
 271
 272        # --- INIT TIMERS ---
 273        # Power Up -> delay one shot 100 mSec
 274        self.timerPowerUp = QTimer()
 275        self.timerPowerUp.setSingleShot(True)
 276        self.timerPowerUp.timeout.connect(self.open)
 277
 278        # Power Down -> delay one shot 50 mSec
 279        self.timerPowerDown = QTimer()
 280        self.timerPowerDown.setSingleShot(True)
 281        self.timerPowerDown.timeout.connect(self.off)
 282
 283        # Artist Title -> delay one shot 100 mSec
 284        self.timerArtistTitle = QTimer()
 285        self.timerArtistTitle.setSingleShot(True)
 286        # self.timerArtistTitle.timeout.connect(self.timerArtistTitleTick)
 287
 288        # New Ensemble -> delay one shot 300 mSec
 289        self.timerNewEnsemble = QTimer()
 290        self.timerNewEnsemble.setSingleShot(True)
 291        self.timerNewEnsemble.timeout.connect(self.timerNewEnsembleTick())
 292
 293        # Read device -> periodic delay 50 mSec
 294        self.timerReadDevice = QTimer()
 295        self.timerReadDevice.timeout.connect(self.readDevice)
 296
 297        # HID to send -> delay 50 mSec
 298        # self.timerHidToSend = QTimer()
 299        # self.timerHidToSend.timeout.connect(self.timerHidToSendTick())
 300
 301
 302    def off(self):
 303        """Power Off"""
 304        self.led.toggleValue()
 305        self.toolStripStatusLabel1.setText("DAB Tuner Disconnected")
 306        self.toolStripStatusLabel2.setText("")
 307        self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("")
 308        self.toolStripStatusLabel4.setText("")
 309        self.pushButtonOn.setEnabled(True)
 310        self.pushButtonOff.setEnabled(False)
 311        self.comboBoxAreas.setEnabled(True)
 312        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setEnabled(False)
 313        self.presetsButtonDisabled()
 314        self.clearPanel()
 315        self.clearTextBox()
 316
 317    def close(self):
 318        """Closes the device (Stand by)."""
 319        # self.timerPowerDown.stop()
 320        self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setValue(0)
 321        self.bufferOut[0] = 0x00
 322        self.bufferOut[1] = 0x00  # Stand by the device ( stop the HID coming IN to the PC )
 323        # self.hidToSend = True
 324        self.hidSend()
 325        self.timerPowerDown.start(50) # Power off after 50ms delay
 326
 327    def clearPanel(self):
 328        """Clears this panel."""
 329        self.labelRSSI.setText("0 db V")
 330        self.labelSNR.setText("0 dB")
 331        self.labelCNR.setText("0 dB")
 332        self.labelFIC.setText("0")
 333        self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(False)
 334        self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(False)
 335        self.checkBoxSaveImage.setEnabled(False)
 336        self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(False)
 337
 338    def clearTextBox(self):
 339        """Clears all TextBox (lineEdit)"""
 340        self.lineEditCurrentService.setText("")
 341        self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("")
 342        self.lineEditTitle.setText("")
 343        self.lineEditBufferIn.setText("")
 344        self.lineEditBufferOut.setText("")
 345        self.lineEditPacket.setText("")
 346        self.lineEditPictureName.setText("")
 347        self.lineEditDateTime.setText("")
 348
 349    def on(self):
 350        """Power On"""
 351        # Load Services list from selected json file in Area SpinBox
 352        # and prohibit changing the services list
 353        self.loadServiceList()
 354        self.comboBoxAreas.setEnabled(False)
 355
 356        # Load Presets list from Services list with position mark ("1" to "12")
 357        self.loadPresets()
 358
 359        # Update Status Bar
 360        self.toolStripStatusLabel1.setText("DAB Tuner connected")
 361        self.toolStripStatusLabel2.setText("")
 362        self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("")
 363        self.toolStripStatusLabel4.setText("")
 364
 365        # Swap buttons On/Off
 366        self.pushButtonOn.setEnabled(False)
 367        self.pushButtonOff.setEnabled(True)
 368
 369        # Some Buttons are now enabled
 370        self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(True)
 371        self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(True)
 372        self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(True)
 373        self.checkBoxArtistTitle.setEnabled(True)
 374        self.checkBoxSaveImage.setEnabled(True)
 375        self.pushButtonScan.setEnabled(True)
 376        self.pushButtonSaveList.setEnabled(True)
 377
 378        # light on the LED
 379        self.led.toggleValue()
 380
 381        self.timerPowerUp.start(100)    # Sends the open command after a 100 ms delay
 382
 383    def open(self):
 384        """Opens the device. A HID device has been plugged in..."""
 385        # self.timerPowerUp.stop()
 386        self.bufferOut[0] = 0x00
 387        self.bufferOut[1] = 0x01
 388        self.bufferOut[2] = 0x02
 389        self.bufferOut[3] = 0x00
 390        self.bufferOut[4] = 0x00
 391        self.bufferOut[5] = 0x09
 392        self.bufferOut[6] = 0xF2
 393        self.bufferOut[7] = 0x00
 394        self.bufferOut[8] = 0x00
 395        self.bufferOut[9] = 0x00
 396        self.bufferOut[10] = 0x00
 397        self.bufferOut[11] = 0x00
 398        self.bufferOut[12] = 0x00
 399        self.bufferOut[13] = 0x00
 400        self.bufferOut[14] = 0x00
 401        self.bufferOut[15] = 0x00
 402        # self.hidToSend = True
 403        self.hidSend()
 404        self.timerReadDevice.start(10)  # Reads the device every 50ms
 405
 406    def getServicesFile(self):
 407        """Gets number of file services json and name of this file and updates the Areas comboBox"""
 408        directory = "json"
 409        files = [f for f in os.listdir(directory) if os.path.isfile(os.path.join(directory, f))]
 410        for row in range(1,len(files)):
 411            item = files[row].replace("services-", "").replace(".json", "")
 412            self.comboBoxAreas.addItems([item])
 413
 414    def loadServiceList(self):
 415        """Loads the Services List."""
 416        index = self.comboBoxAreas.currentIndex()
 417        if index == 0 :
 418            serviceList = "json/services-Default.json"
 419        else:
 420            serviceList = "json/services-"+ self.comboBoxAreas.currentText() + ".json"
 421
 422        # List all services from json file
 423        with open(serviceList, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
 424            data1 = json.load(f)
 425
 426        self.nbServices = sum([1 for i in data1])
 427
 428        self.services.clear()
 429        # Appending instances to list
 430        for i in range(1, self.nbServices + 1):
 431            self.services.append(
 432                Service(
 433                    data1["service" + str(i)]["Preset"],
 434                    data1["service" + str(i)]["Service Name"],
 435                    data1["service" + str(i)]["Service ID"],
 436                    data1["service" + str(i)]["Component ID"],
 437                    data1["service" + str(i)]["Tune Index"],
 438                    data1["service" + str(i)]["Tune Frequency kHz"],
 439                    data1["service" + str(i)]["EID"],
 440                    data1["service" + str(i)]["Component Label"]
 441                )
 442            )
 443        self.tableWidgetViewServices.clearContents() # Clear the table of services
 444        if self.nbServices != 0 :
 445            for row in range(0, self.nbServices):
 446                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 0, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].preset))
 447                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 1, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].serviceName))
 448                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 2, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].serviceID))
 449                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 3, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].componentID))
 450                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 4, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].tuneIndex))
 451                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 5, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].tuneFrequency))
 452                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 6, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].EID))
 453                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 7, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].componentLabel))
 454            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("Select a Service from the list")
 455
 456            # Load all presets
 457            self.nbPresets = 0
 458            self.presets.clear()
 459
 460            for index in range(1, 13):
 461                for row in range(0, self.nbServices):
 462                    if self.services[row].preset == str(index):
 463                        self.presets.append(
 464                            Preset(
 465                                str(row),
 466                                self.services[row].serviceName,
 467                                self.services[row].serviceID,
 468                                self.services[row].componentID,
 469                                self.services[row].tuneIndex,
 470                                self.services[row].tuneFrequency,
 471                                self.services[row].EID,
 472                                self.services[row].componentLabel
 473                            )
 474                        )
 475            self.nbPresets = len(self.presets)
 476            self.loadPresets()
 477        else :
 478            msgBox5 = QMessageBox()
 479            msgBox5.setWindowTitle("DAB WARNING")
 480            msgBox5.setText("Services list is empty : scan for services")
 481            msgBox5.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok)
 482            if msgBox5.exec() == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok:
 483                pass
 484            else:
 485                pass
 486
 487    def loadServiceListAfterScan(self):
 488        """Loads Service List  after scan"""
 489        self.tableWidgetViewServices.clearContents()  # Clear the table of services
 490        if self.nbServices != 0:
 491            for row in range(0, self.nbServices):
 492                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 0, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].preset))
 493                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 1, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].serviceName))
 494                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 2, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].serviceID))
 495                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 3, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].componentID))
 496                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 4, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].tuneIndex))
 497                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 5, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].tuneFrequency))
 498                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 6, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].EID))
 499                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 7, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].componentLabel))
 500            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("Select a Service from the list")
 501
 502    def readDevice(self):
 503        """Reads the device"""
 504        # self.timer.stop()
 505        try:
 506            self.bufferIn = self.myDevice.read(size=40, timeout=1)
 507            if self.bufferIn:
 508                dataInHex = ' '.join('{:02X}'.format(a) for a in self.bufferIn)
 509                self.lineEditBufferIn.setText(dataInHex)
 510                self.onRead()
 511        except UsbHidIOError:
 512            pass
 513            # msgBox = QMessageBox()
 514            # msgBox.setWindowTitle("Message")
 515            # msgBox.setText("Reading error")
 516            # msgBox.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel)
 517            # msgBox.setDefaultButton(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel)
 518            # answer = msgBox.exec()
 519            # if answer == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel:
 520            #     pass
 521
 522    def onRead(self):
 523        """Reads bytes in bufferIn from the microcontroller and determines which function to run.
 524        These bytes come after 50 ms interval maximum.
 525        """
 526        # self.timerHidToSend.start(50)
 527
 528        match self.bufferIn[0]:
 529            case 0x08:                # Response 0x08 GET_PART_INFO ( See AN649 )
 530                self.partInfo()
 531            case 0x09:               # Response 0x09 GET_SYS_STATE ( See AN649 )
 532                self.systemState()
 533            case 0x12:               # Response 0x12 GET_FUNC_INFO ( See AN649 )
 534                self.firmwareRevision()
 535            case 0x80:               # Response 0x80 GET_DIGITAL_SERVICE_LIST ( See AN649 )
 536                self.digitalServiceList()
 537            case 0x84:               # Response 0x84. GET_DIGITAL_SERVICE_DATA ( See AN649 )
 538                self.getDigitalServiceData()
 539            case 0xB2:               # Response 0xB2 DAB_DIGRAD_STATUS ( See AN649 )
 540                self.dabDigradStatus()
 541            case 0xB4:               # Response 0xB4 DAB_GET_ENSEMBLE_INFO ( See AN649 )
 542                self.ensembleInfo()
 543            case 0xBC:               # Response 0xBC DAB_GET_TIME ( See AN649 )
 544                self.dabGetTime()
 545            case 0xBD:               # Response 0xBD DAB_GET_AUDIO_INFO ( See AN649 )
 546                self.dabGetAudioInfo()
 547            case 0xC0:               # Response 0xC0 DAB_GET_SERVICE_INFO ( See AN649 )
 548                self.dabGetServiceInfo()
 549            case 0xF0:               # Tuning for a new ensemble
 550                self.tuningForNewEnsemble()
 551            case 0xFF:               # Service List not available
 552                serviceListNotAvailable()
 553
 554    def partInfo(self):
 555        """Provides the Part Info (Skyworks and Microchip numbers)."""
 556        Skyworks_Part_Number = str(self.bufferIn[13] * 256 + self.bufferIn[12])
 557        Microchip_Part_Number = chr(self.bufferIn[27]) + chr(self.bufferIn[28]) + chr(self.bufferIn[29]) + \
 558                                chr(self.bufferIn[30]) + chr(self.bufferIn[31]) + chr(self.bufferIn[32]) + \
 559                                chr(self.bufferIn[33]) + chr(self.bufferIn[34]) + chr(self.bufferIn[35]) + \
 560                                chr(self.bufferIn[36]) + chr(self.bufferIn[37]) + chr(self.bufferIn[38])
 561        partInfoText = Microchip_Part_Number + " / Si" + Skyworks_Part_Number
 562        self.toolStripStatusLabel2.setText(partInfoText)
 563
 564    def systemState(self):
 565        """Analyzes the states of the system.
 566        """
 567        productName = chr(self.bufferIn[10]) + chr(self.bufferIn[11]) + chr(self.bufferIn[12]) + \
 568                        chr(self.bufferIn[13]) + chr(self.bufferIn[14]) + chr(self.bufferIn[15]) + \
 569                        chr(self.bufferIn[16]) + chr(self.bufferIn[17]) + chr(self.bufferIn[18]) + \
 570                        chr(self.bufferIn[19]) + chr(self.bufferIn[20]) + chr(self.bufferIn[21]) + \
 571                        chr(self.bufferIn[22]) + chr(self.bufferIn[23]) + chr(self.bufferIn[24]) + \
 572                        chr(self.bufferIn[25]) + chr(self.bufferIn[26]) + chr(self.bufferIn[27]) + \
 573                        chr(self.bufferIn[28]) + chr(self.bufferIn[29]) + chr(self.bufferIn[30]) + \
 574                        chr(self.bufferIn[31]) + chr(self.bufferIn[32]) + chr(self.bufferIn[33]) + \
 575                        chr(self.bufferIn[34]) + chr(self.bufferIn[35]) + chr(self.bufferIn[36]) + \
 576                        chr(self.bufferIn[37]) + chr(self.bufferIn[39]) + chr(self.bufferIn[39])
 577        self.toolStripStatusLabel1.setText(productName + "Connected")
 578
 579        Image_System = self.bufferIn[8]
 580        match Image_System:
 581            case 0:
 582                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("Bootloader is active")
 583            case 1:
 584                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("FMHD is active")
 585            case 2:
 586                self.volume()
 587                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("DAB is active")
 588                # self.presetsButtonEnabled()
 589                self.pushButtonScan.setEnabled(True)
 590                self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(True)
 591                self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(True)
 592                self.checkBoxArtistTitle.setEnabled(True)
 593                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setEnabled(True)
 594                self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(True)
 595                # self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("Select a Service from the list")
 596
 597                # Load the Default Image ( 320x240 )
 598                pixmap = QPixmap("DAB_Default.jpg")
 599                self.labelPicture.setPixmap(pixmap)
 600                # Another
 601                for x in range(16):
 602                    self.bufferOut[x] = 0x00
 603                self.bufferOut[1] = 0x13    # Modify this property here to enable another PAD
 604                self.bufferOut[4] = 0xB4    # Property 0xB400. DAB_XPAD_ENABLE ( See AN649 )
 605                self.bufferOut[5] = 0x05    # 0x0005 : DLS and MOT SLS are enabled by default
 606                self.hidToSend = True
 607
 608            case 3:
 609                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("TDMB or data only DAB image is active")
 610            case 4:
 611                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("FMHD Demod is active")
 612            case 5:
 613                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("AMHD is active")
 614            case 6:
 615                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("AMHD Demod is active")
 616            case 7:
 617                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("FMHD is active")
 618            case 9:
 619                self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("DAB Demod is active")
 620
 621    def firmwareRevision(self):
 622        """Provides the SI firmware and PIC firmware"""
 623        SI_First_Rev = str(self.bufferIn[8])
 624        SI_Second_Rev = str(self.bufferIn[9])
 625        SI_Third_Rev = str(self.bufferIn[10])
 626        PIC_First_Rev = str(self.bufferIn[16])
 627        PIC_Second_Rev = str(self.bufferIn[17])
 628        PIC_Third_Rev = str(self.bufferIn[18])
 629        firmwareText = " PIC Firmware revision : " + PIC_First_Rev + "." + PIC_Second_Rev + "." + PIC_Third_Rev + \
 630                       " / Si Firmware revision : " + SI_First_Rev + "." + SI_Second_Rev + "." + SI_Third_Rev
 631        self.toolStripStatusLabel4.setText(firmwareText)
 632
 633    def digitalServiceList(self):
 634        """Provides the Digital Service List"""
 635        serviceID = hex(self.bufferIn[15] * 16777216 + self.bufferIn[14] * 65536 + self.bufferIn[13] * 256 + self.bufferIn[12])
 636        serviceName = ""
 637        for index in range(20, 36):
 638            serviceName = serviceName + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[index]])
 639        componentID = hex(self.bufferIn[39] * 16777216 + self.bufferIn[38] * 65536 + self.bufferIn[37] * 256 + self.bufferIn[36])
 640        if self.bufferOut[1] == 0x40:
 641            self.nbServices += 1
 642            self.totalServices += 1
 643            self.my_array[self.currentTuneIndex][4] = self.nbServices
 644            self.service.lineEditNbServices.setText(str(self.totalServices))
 645        self.tableWidgetViewServices.insertRow(self.rowPosition)
 646        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 0, QTableWidgetItem("0"))
 647        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 1, QTableWidgetItem(serviceName))
 648        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 2, QTableWidgetItem(serviceID))
 649        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 3, QTableWidgetItem(componentID))
 650        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 4, QTableWidgetItem(str(self.currentTuneIndex)))
 651        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 5, QTableWidgetItem(str(self.currentTuneFrequency)))
 652        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 6, QTableWidgetItem(self.currentEID))
 653        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(self.rowPosition, 7, QTableWidgetItem(self.currentComponentLabel))
 654
 655        self. rowPosition = self. rowPosition + 1
 656
 657    def readTableService(self, table):
 658        """
 659        Reads QTableWidget and return a dictionary of contents
 660        :param table: Tables of services
 661        """
 662        content = {}
 663        nbRow = self.tableWidgetViewServices.rowCount()
 664        print("Total Services 2: ", self.tableWidgetViewServices.rowCount())
 665        for row in range(nbRow):
 666            key = "service" + str(row + 1)
 667            service = {}
 668            for column in range(table.columnCount()):
 669                header = table.horizontalHeaderItem(column).text()
 670                item = table.item(row, column).text() if table.item(row, column) else ""
 671                service[header] = item
 672            content[key] = service
 673        return content
 674
 675    def saveServicesList(self):
 676        """Saves the services list into a new area json file"""
 677        area, ok = QInputDialog.getText(self , "Services List Save", "Enter the name of this area: ")
 678        if ok and area:
 679            fileName = "json/services-" + area.capitalize() + ".json"
 680            content = self.readTableService(self.tableWidgetViewServices)
 681            with open(fileName, "w", encoding='utf-8') as file:
 682                file.write(json.dumps(content, indent=4))
 683        else:
 684            pass
 685
 686    def dabDigradStatus(self):
 687        """Provides the DAB Digrad Status"""
 688        # Tune frequency and index
 689        self.currentTuneFrequency = (self.bufferIn[19] * 0x1000000) + (self.bufferIn[18] * 0x10000) + (self.bufferIn[17] * 0x100) + self.bufferIn[16]
 690        self.currentTuneIndex = self.bufferIn[20]
 691        self.my_array[self.currentTuneIndex][0] = self.currentTuneIndex
 692        self.my_array[self.currentTuneIndex][1] = self.currentTuneFrequency
 693
 694        # Analog or optical output
 695        if self.bufferIn[27] != self.jackStatus:
 696            self. jackStatus = self.bufferIn[27]
 697            match self.jackStatus:
 698                case 0x00:
 699                    self.labelOuput.setText("Analog Output")
 700                    self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(True)
 701                    self.labelVolume = self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.value().toString()
 702                    self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(True)
 703                    self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(True)
 704                case 0x02:
 705                    self.labelOuput.setText("Optical Output")
 706                    self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(False)
 707                    self.labelVolume = "0"
 708                    self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(False)
 709                    self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(True)
 710                case 0x03:
 711                    self.labelOuput.setText("")
 712                    self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(False)
 713                    self.labelVolume = "0"
 714                    self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(False)
 715                    self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(False)
 716
 717        if self.bufferIn[10] < 128:
 718            RSSI = self.bufferIn[10] & 0x3F
 719        else:
 720            RSSI = self.bufferIn[10] - 256
 721        self.my_array[self.currentTuneIndex][2] = RSSI
 722        valid = self.bufferIn[9] & 0x01
 723        self.my_array[self.currentTuneIndex][3] = valid
 724        SNR = self.bufferIn[11]
 725        CNR = self.bufferIn[13]
 726        FICQuality = self.bufferIn[12]
 727        self.nbServices = 0
 728        if self.bufferOut[1] != 0x40:
 729            self.labelRSSI.setText(str(RSSI) + " dB V")
 730            self.progressBarRSSI.setValue(RSSI)
 731            self.labelSNR.setText(str(SNR) + " dB")
 732            if SNR > 20:
 733                self.progressBarSNR.setValue(20)
 734            else:
 735                self.progressBarSNR.setValue(SNR)
 736            self.labelCNR.setText(str(CNR) + " dB")
 737            if CNR > 54 :
 738                self.progressBarCNR.setValue(54)
 739            else:
 740                self.progressBarCNR.setValue(CNR)
 741            self.labelFIC.setText(str(FICQuality))
 742            if FICQuality > 100 :
 743                self.progressBarFIC.setValue(100)
 744            else:
 745                self.progressBarFIC.setValue(FICQuality)
 746        self.service.setArray(self.my_array)
 747
 748        if self.bufferOut[1] == 0x40:
 749            self.service.progressBar.setValue(self.currentTuneIndex)
 750            self.service.labelScanning.setText("Scanning: " + str(self.currentTuneFrequency) + " Mhz")
 751            if self.currentTuneIndex == 39:
 752                self.service.labelScanning.setText("Scanning complete")
 753                self.service.pushButtonClose.setEnabled(True)
 754                if self.totalServices != 0:
 755                    self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("Select a Service from the list")
 756                    self.nbServices = self.totalServices
 757                else:
 758                    self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("No available service")
 759
 760    def ensembleInfo(self):
 761        """Provides the Ensemble Information"""
 762        self.currentEID = hex(self.bufferIn[8] * 256  + self.bufferIn[9])
 763        self.currentComponentLabel = ""
 764        for index in range(10, 26):
 765            self.currentComponentLabel = self.currentComponentLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[index]])
 766        # self.currentComponentLabel = chr(self.bufferIn[10]) + chr(self.bufferIn[11]) + chr(self.bufferIn[12]) \
 767        #                  + chr(self.bufferIn[13]) + chr(self.bufferIn[14]) + chr(self.bufferIn[15]) \
 768        #                  + chr(self.bufferIn[16]) + chr(self.bufferIn[17]) + chr(self.bufferIn[18]) \
 769        #                  + chr(self.bufferIn[19]) + chr(self.bufferIn[20]) + chr(self.bufferIn[21]) \
 770        #                  + chr(self.bufferIn[22]) + chr(self.bufferIn[23]) + chr(self.bufferIn[24]) \
 771        #                  + chr(self.bufferIn[25])
 772        # print("Component Label: ",self.currentComponentLabel)
 773
 774    def getDigitalServiceData(self):
 775        """Provides the Digital Service Data"""
 776        pictureName = ""
 777        self.packetIndex = self.bufferIn[6]
 778        if self.packetIndex == 0x00:
 779            self.PADDataType = self.bufferIn[11]
 780            match self.PADDataType:
 781                case 0x80:  # DLS
 782                    self.DLSType = self.bufferIn[28]
 783                    self.DLSLength = self.bufferIn[22] - 3
 784                    # print("DLSLength: ", '{:02X}'.format(self.DLSLength))
 785                    match self.DLSType:
 786                        case 0x00:  #  New DLS
 787                            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("")
 788                            self.lineEditTitle.setText("")
 789                            self.dynamicLabel = ""
 790                            if self.DLSLength > 9:
 791                                for var in range(30, 40):
 792                                    # Char  , , , , ,...OK ( &H7F to &HFF )
 793                                    self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 794                                self.DLSLength = self.DLSLength - 10
 795                            else:
 796                                for var in range(30, self.DLSLength + 30):
 797                                    # Char  , , , , ,...OK ( &H7F to &HFF )
 798                                    self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 799                            # self.timerArtistTitle.setInterval(100)
 800                            self.timerArtistTitle.start()
 801                        case 0x80:  # New DLS
 802                            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("")
 803                            self.lineEditTitle.setText("")
 804                            self.dynamicLabel = ""
 805                            if self.DLSLength > 9:
 806                                for var in range(30, 40):
 807                                    # Char  , , , , ,...OK ( &H7F to &HFF )
 808                                    self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 809                                self.DLSLength = self.DLSLength - 10
 810                            else:
 811                                for var in range(30, self.DLSLength + 30):
 812                                    # Char  , , , , ,...OK ( &H7F to &HFF )
 813                                    self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 814                            # self.timerArtistTitle.setInterval(100)
 815                            self.timerArtistTitle.start()
 816                        case 0x12:
 817                            # print("Case: ", 0x12)
 818                            if self.bufferIn[33] != 0x0 and self.bufferIn[35] != 0x0 and self.bufferIn[36] != 0x0:
 819                                titleLen = self.bufferIn[33] + 1
 820                                artistLen = self.bufferIn[36] + 1
 821                                artistIndex = self.bufferIn[35]
 822                                self.title = self.dynamicLabel[0: titleLen]
 823                                self.artist = self.dynamicLabel[artistIndex: (artistIndex + artistLen)]
 824                                self.lineEditTitle.setText("Title: " + self.title)
 825                                self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("Artist: " + self.artist)
 826                            else:
 827                                if self.checkBoxArtistTitle.isChecked():
 828                                    self.softLabelsArtistTitle()
 829                                else:
 830                                    self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText(self.dynamicLabel)
 831                        case 0x92:
 832                            if self.bufferIn[33] != 0x0 and self.bufferIn[35] != 0x0 and self.bufferIn[36] != 0x0:
 833                                titleLen = self.bufferIn[33] + 1
 834                                artistLen = self.bufferIn[36] + 1
 835                                artistIndex = self.bufferIn[35]
 836                                self.title = self.dynamicLabel[0: titleLen]
 837                                self.artist = self.dynamicLabel[artistIndex: (artistIndex + artistLen)]
 838                                self.lineEditTitle.setText("Title: " + self.title)
 839                                self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("Artist: " + self.artist)
 840                            else:
 841                                if self.checkBoxArtistTitle.isChecked():
 842                                    self.softLabelsArtistTitle()
 843                                else:
 844                                    self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText(self.dynamicLabel)
 845
 846                case 0x7C:
 847                    self.MOTSLSType = self.bufferIn[28]  # MOT SLS
 848                    self.SLSLength = self.bufferIn[35] * 256 + self.bufferIn[36]
 849                    match self.MOTSLSType:
 850                        case 0x73:  # Image Name
 851                            self.lineEditPictureName.setText("")
 852                        case 0x74:  # Image
 853                            result = []
 854                            indexImage = 0
 855                            if self.imageStart: # TRUE
 856                                indexImage = self.bufferIn[31] + 1
 857                                self.lineEditPacket.setText(str(indexImage))
 858                                for k in range(37, 40):
 859                                    result.append(self.bufferIn[k])
 860                                self.pictureByte = self.pictureByte.append(bytes(result))
 861                                self.SLSLength = self.SLSLength - 3
 862        else:
 863            self.payloadLength = self.bufferIn[7]
 864            match self.PADDataType:
 865                case 0x80:
 866                    if self.payloadLength > 1:
 867                        match self.DLSType:
 868                            case 0x00:
 869                                if self.DLSLength > 32:
 870                                    for var in range(8, 40):
 871                                        self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 872                                    self.DLSLength = self.DLSLength - 32
 873                                else:
 874                                    for var in range(8, self.DLSLength + 8):
 875                                        self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 876                            case 0x80:
 877                                if self.DLSLength > 32:
 878                                    for var in range(8, 40):
 879                                        self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 880                                    self.DLSLength = self.DLSLength - 32
 881                                else:
 882                                    for var in range(8, self.DLSLength + 8):
 883                                        self.dynamicLabel = self.dynamicLabel + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 884                case 0x7C:
 885                    if self.payloadLength > 2:
 886                        match self.MOTSLSType:
 887                            case 0x73:
 888                                for var in range(20, 28):
 889                                    pictureName = pictureName + chr(DLS_Ascii[self.bufferIn[var]])
 890                                self.lineEditPictureName.setText(pictureName)
 891                                if pictureName != "":
 892                                    if self.saveImage:
 893                                        self.pictureFile = pictureName
 894                                        self.labelSavedImage.setText("* The last saved image: " + pictureName + " *")
 895                                    else:
 896                                        self.pictureFile = "picture.jpg"
 897                                    self.loadingPicture3()
 898                                self.imageStart = True
 899                            case 0x74:
 900                                if self.imageStart:
 901                                    result = []
 902                                    if self.SLSLength > 32:
 903                                        for k in range(8, 40):
 904                                            result.append(self.bufferIn[k])
 905                                        self.pictureByte = self.pictureByte.append(bytes(result))
 906                                        self.SLSLength = self.SLSLength - 32
 907                                    else:
 908                                        for k in range(8, self.SLSLength + 8):
 909                                            result.append(self.bufferIn[k])
 910                                        self.pictureByte = self.pictureByte.append(bytes(result))
 911
 912    def timerArtistTitleTick(self):
 913        """Timer Artist Title Tick"""
 914        self.timerArtistTitle.stop()
 915        if self.checkBoxArtistTitle.isChecked():
 916            self.softLabelsArtistTitle()
 917        else:
 918            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText(self.dynamicLabel)
 919
 920    def softLabelsArtistTitle(self):
 921        """Displays the labels artist title."""
 922        dlsLen = len(self.dynamicLabel)
 923        charPosition = self.dynamicLabel.find(" - ", 0, dlsLen)
 924        if charPosition != 0:
 925            self.title = self.dynamicLabel[0: charPosition]
 926            self.artist = self.dynamicLabel[charPosition + 2: dlsLen]
 927            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText(self.artist)
 928            self.lineEditTitle.setText(self.title)
 929        else:
 930            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText(self.dynamicLabel)
 931
 932    def loadingPicture3(self):
 933        """Loads a image new method."""
 934        if self.pictureByte:
 935            self.imageStart = False
 936            picturePath = Path('.').resolve() / "Images" / self.pictureFile
 937            self.fileJPG = open(picturePath, "wb")
 938            self.fileJPG.write(bytes(self.pictureByte))
 939            self.fileJPG.close()
 940            pixmap = QPixmap(picturePath)
 941            self.labelPicture.setPixmap(pixmap)
 942            self.pictureByte.clear()
 943
 944    def saveImageEnable(self):
 945        """Current image can be saved"""
 946        if self.saveImage:
 947            self.saveImage = False
 948        else:
 949            self.saveImage = True
 950
 951    def dabGetTime(self):
 952        """Provides DAB time and date Information (case response 0xBC)."""
 953        year = self.bufferIn[9] * 256 + self.bufferIn[8]
 954        months = self.bufferIn[10]
 955        days = self.bufferIn[11]
 956        hours = self.bufferIn[12]
 957        minutes = self.bufferIn[13]
 958        seconds = self.bufferIn[14]
 959        date = QDate(year, months, days).toString("d MMMM yyyy")
 960        time = QTime(hours, minutes, seconds).toString()
 961        dateTime = "Date: " + date + "  Time: " + time
 962        self.lineEditDateTime.setText(dateTime)
 963
 964    def dabGetAudioInfo(self):
 965        """Provides DAB Audio Information (case response 0xBD)."""
 966        bitRate = self.bufferIn[9] * 256 + self.bufferIn[8]
 967        self.labelBitRate.setText("Bit Rate: " + str(bitRate) + " kbps")
 968        sampleRate = (self.bufferIn[11] * 256 + self.bufferIn[10]) / 1000
 969        self.labelSampleRate.setText("Sample Rate: " + str(sampleRate) + " kHz")
 970
 971    def dabGetServiceInfo(self):
 972        """Provides DAB service information (case response  0xC0)."""
 973        currentService = chr(self.bufferIn[12]) + chr(self.bufferIn[13]) + chr(self.bufferIn[14]) \
 974                         + chr(self.bufferIn[15]) + chr(self.bufferIn[16]) + chr(self.bufferIn[17]) \
 975                         + chr(self.bufferIn[18]) + chr(self.bufferIn[19]) + chr(self.bufferIn[20]) \
 976                         + chr(self.bufferIn[21]) + chr(self.bufferIn[22]) + chr(self.bufferIn[23]) \
 977                         + chr(self.bufferIn[24]) + chr(self.bufferIn[25]) + chr(self.bufferIn[26]) \
 978                         + chr(self.bufferIn[27]) + chr(self.bufferIn[27])
 979        self.lineEditCurrentService.setText(currentService)
 980
 981    def tuningForNewEnsemble(self):
 982        """Tuning For New Ensemble"""
 983        self.progressBarRSSI.setValue(0)
 984        self.progressBarSNR.setValue(0)
 985        self.progressBarCNR.setValue(0)
 986        self.progressBarFIC.setValue(0)
 987        self.labelRSSI.setText("00 dB V")
 988        self.labelSNR.setText("00 DB")
 989        self.labelCNR.setText("00 dB")
 990        self.labelFIC.setText("000")
 991        self.labelBitRate.setText("Bit Rate: ")
 992        self.labelSampleRate.setText("Sample Rate: ")
 993        self.ensemble.show()
 994        self.ensemble.setLabel("Tuning for a new ensemble")
 995        self.ensemble.setProgressBarValue(0)
 996        self.timerNewEnsemble.start(300) # Starts updating the ensemble panel with a progress bar
 997                                         # that advances by 10% after 300 ms
 998                                         # and closes at the end
 999
1000    def timerNewEnsembleTick(self):
1001        """Timer New Ensemble Tick"""
1002        if self.ensemble.getProgressBarValue() == 100:
1003            self.timerNewEnsemble.stop()
1004            self.ensemble.close()
1005        else:
1006            newValue = self.ensemble.getProgressBarValue() + 10
1007            self.ensemble.setProgressBarValue(newValue)
1008
1009
1010    def loadServices(self):
1011        """Loads Services"""
1012        if self.nbServices != 0 :
1013            for row in range(0, self.nbServices):
1014                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 0, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].preset))
1015                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 1, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].serviceName))
1016                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 2, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].serviceID))
1017                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 3, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].componentID))
1018                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 4, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].tuneIndex))
1019                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 5, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].tuneFrequency))
1020                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 6, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].EID))
1021                self.tableWidgetViewServices.setItem(row, 7, QTableWidgetItem(self.services[row].componentLabel))
1022            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("Select a Service from the list")
1023        else :
1024            msgBox3 = QMessageBox()
1025            msgBox3.setWindowTitle("DAB WARNING")
1026            msgBox3.setText("Services list is empty : scan for services")
1027            msgBox3.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok)
1028            if msgBox3.exec() == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok:
1029                pass
1030            else:
1031                pass
1032
1033    def dataGridViewServicesCellClick(self):
1034        """
1035        Data Grid View Services Cell Click
1036        Set Data Services
1037        return: row
1038        """
1039        row = self.tableWidgetViewServices.currentRow()
1040        self.currentIndex = row
1041        self.startService()
1042
1043    def startService(self):
1044        """Starts the selected service on data grid panel or presets panel"""
1045        row = self.currentIndex
1046        self.bufferOut[1] = 0x81
1047        self.bufferOut[2] = 0x00
1048        tuneIndex = int(self.services[row].tuneIndex)
1049        self.bufferOut[3] = tuneIndex
1050        self.bufferOut[4] = 0x00
1051
1052        serviceID = int(self.services[row].serviceID, 16)
1053        self.bufferOut[5] = serviceID & 255
1054        self.bufferOut[6] = int((serviceID & 65280) / 256)
1055        self.bufferOut[7] = int((serviceID & 16711680) / 65536)
1056        self.bufferOut[8] = int((serviceID & 4278190080) / 16777216)
1057
1058        componentID = int(self.services[row].componentID, 16)
1059        self.bufferOut[9] = componentID & 255
1060        self.bufferOut[10] = int((componentID & 65280) / 256)
1061        self.bufferOut[11] = int((componentID & 16711680) / 65536)
1062        self.bufferOut[12] = int((componentID & 4278190080) / 16777216)
1063
1064        self.bufferOut[13] = 0x00
1065        self.bufferOut[14] = 0x00
1066        self.bufferOut[15] = 0x00
1067
1068        self.hidToSend = True
1069        self.hidSendCheck()
1070
1071    def buttonScanClick(self):
1072        """Scans for available DAB+ radio stations.
1073        """
1074        self.tableWidgetViewServices.clear()
1075        headerH = ['Preset','Service Name', 'Service ID', 'Component ID', 'Tune Index', 'Tune Frequency kHz', 'EID',
1076                   'Component Label']
1077        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setHorizontalHeaderLabels(headerH)
1078
1079        self.nbServices = 0
1080        self.totalServices = 0
1081        self.progressBarRSSI.setValue(0)
1082        self.progressBarSNR.setValue(0)
1083        self.progressBarCNR.setValue(0)
1084        self.progressBarFIC.setValue(0)
1085        self.labelRSSI.setText("00 dBµV")
1086        self.labelSNR.setText("00 dB")
1087        self.labelCNR.setText("00 dB")
1088        self.labelFIC.setText("000")
1089        self.labelBitRate.setText("Bit Rate: ")
1090        self.labelSampleRate.setText("Sample Rate: ")
1091        self.bufferOut[0] = 0x00
1092        self.bufferOut[1] = 0x40
1093        self.bufferOut[2] = 0x01
1094        self.bufferOut[3] = 0x00
1095        self.bufferOut[4] = 0x00
1096        self.bufferOut[5] = 0x00
1097        self.bufferOut[6] = 0x00
1098        self.bufferOut[7] = 0x00
1099        self.bufferOut[8] = 0x00
1100        self.bufferOut[9] = 0x00
1101        self.bufferOut[10] = 0x00
1102        self.bufferOut[11] = 0x00
1103        self.bufferOut[12] = 0x00
1104        self.bufferOut[13] = 0x00
1105        self.bufferOut[14] = 0x00
1106        self.bufferOut[15] = 0x00
1107        self.service.show()
1108        self.service.labelScanning.setText("running ...")
1109        self.service.tableWidgetService.clearContents()
1110        self.service.pushButtonClose.setEnabled(False)
1111        self.hidToSend = True
1112        self.hidSendCheck()
1113
1114# PRESETS DAB+ RADIO
1115    def presetsButtonDisabled(self):
1116        """All presets buttons are disabled"""
1117        self.pushButtonPreset1.setEnabled(False)
1118        self.pushButtonPreset2.setEnabled(False)
1119        self.pushButtonPreset3.setEnabled(False)
1120        self.pushButtonPreset4.setEnabled(False)
1121        self.pushButtonPreset5.setEnabled(False)
1122        self.pushButtonPreset6.setEnabled(False)
1123        self.pushButtonPreset7.setEnabled(False)
1124        self.pushButtonPreset8.setEnabled(False)
1125        self.pushButtonPreset9.setEnabled(False)
1126        self.pushButtonPreset10.setEnabled(False)
1127        self.pushButtonPreset11.setEnabled(False)
1128        self.pushButtonPreset12.setEnabled(False)
1129
1130    def presetsButtonEnabled(self):
1131        """All presets buttons are enabled"""
1132        self.pushButtonPreset1.setEnabled(True)
1133        self.pushButtonPreset2.setEnabled(True)
1134        self.pushButtonPreset3.setEnabled(True)
1135        self.pushButtonPreset4.setEnabled(True)
1136        self.pushButtonPreset5.setEnabled(True)
1137        self.pushButtonPreset6.setEnabled(True)
1138        self.pushButtonPreset7.setEnabled(True)
1139        self.pushButtonPreset8.setEnabled(True)
1140        self.pushButtonPreset9.setEnabled(True)
1141        self.pushButtonPreset10.setEnabled(True)
1142        self.pushButtonPreset11.setEnabled(True)
1143        self.pushButtonPreset12.setEnabled(True)
1144
1145    def buttonMemoryClick(self):
1146        """ If pushButton is clicked, a new Presets list must be modified"""
1147        if self.memory == False:
1148            self.memory = True
1149            self.resetPresets()
1150        else:
1151            self.memory = False
1152
1153    def resetPresets(self):
1154        """Resets all presets and allows you to modify the list of presets"""
1155        msgBox6 = QMessageBox()
1156        msgBox6.setWindowTitle("DAB WARNING")
1157        msgBox6.setText('You can modify the list and order of the presets in the "Services List" table (under the "Presets" column): 0 indicates the selected preset, while 1, 2, 3, etc., determine the preset order. To apply the changes, click "Save this services list," then click "Off" followed by "On" to refresh the presets.')
1158        msgBox6.setInformativeText("Are you sure?")
1159        msgBox6.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Yes | QMessageBox.StandardButton.No)
1160        answer = msgBox6.exec()
1161        if answer == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Yes:
1162            # self.buttonPresetNoClicked()
1163            self.presetsButtonDisabled()
1164            self.pushButtonMemory.setEnabled(False)
1165        if answer == QMessageBox.StandardButton.No:
1166            pass
1167
1168    def loadPresets(self):
1169        """Loads all presets"""
1170        self.pushButtonMemory.setEnabled(True)
1171        for index in range(self.nbPresets):
1172            match index:
1173                case 0:
1174                    self.pushButtonPreset1.setText(self.presets[0].serviceName.strip())
1175                    self.pushButtonPreset1.setEnabled(True)
1176                case 1:
1177                    self.pushButtonPreset2.setText(self.presets[1].serviceName.strip())
1178                    self.pushButtonPreset2.setEnabled(True)
1179                case 2:
1180                    self.pushButtonPreset3.setText(self.presets[2].serviceName.strip())
1181                    self.pushButtonPreset3.setEnabled(True)
1182                case 3:
1183                    self.pushButtonPreset4.setText(self.presets[3].serviceName.strip())
1184                    self.pushButtonPreset4.setEnabled(True)
1185                case 4:
1186                    self.pushButtonPreset5.setText(self.presets[4].serviceName.strip())
1187                    self.pushButtonPreset5.setEnabled(True)
1188                case 5:
1189                    self.pushButtonPreset6.setText(self.presets[5].serviceName.strip())
1190                    self.pushButtonPreset6.setEnabled(True)
1191                case 6:
1192                    self.pushButtonPreset7.setText(self.presets[6].serviceName.strip())
1193                    self.pushButtonPreset7.setEnabled(True)
1194                case 7:
1195                    self.pushButtonPreset8.setText(self.presets[7].serviceName.strip())
1196                    self.pushButtonPreset8.setEnabled(True)
1197                case 8:
1198                    self.pushButtonPreset9.setText(self.presets[8].serviceName.strip())
1199                    self.pushButtonPreset9.setEnabled(True)
1200                case 9:
1201                    self.pushButtonPreset10.setText(self.presets[9].serviceName.strip())
1202                    self.pushButtonPreset10.setEnabled(True)
1203                case 10:
1204                    self.pushButtonPreset11.setText(self.presets[10].serviceName.strip())
1205                    self.pushButtonPreset11.setEnabled(True)
1206                case 11:
1207                    self.pushButtonPreset12.setText(self.presets[11].serviceName.strip())
1208                    self.pushButtonPreset12.setEnabled(True)
1209                case _:
1210                    pass
1211
1212    def savePresetsMark(self):
1213        """Saves Presets marks into json Services File"""
1214        # Creating the json object
1215        settings = {}
1216        for row in range(0, self.nbServices):
1217            preset = self.services[row].preset
1218            serviceName = self.services[row].serviceName
1219            serviceId = self.services[row].serviceID
1220            componentID = self.services[row].componentID
1221            tuneIndex = self.services[row].tuneIndex
1222            tuneFrequency = self.services[row].tuneFrequency
1223            EID = self.services[row].EID
1224            componentLabel = self.services[row].componentLabel
1225            serviceIndex = "service" + str(row + 1)
1226            serviceDict = {
1227                "preset": preset,
1228                "serviceName": serviceName,
1229                "serviceID": serviceId,
1230                "componentID": componentID,
1231                "tuneIndex": tuneIndex,
1232                "tuneFrequency": tuneFrequency,
1233                "EID": EID,
1234                "componentLabel": componentLabel
1235            }
1236            settings[serviceIndex] = serviceDict
1237        # Serializing Json
1238        json_object = json.dumps(settings, indent=7)
1239
1240        # Updating or creating the json file
1241        file_name, _ = QFileDialog.getSaveFileName(self, "Save Services json File", "", "Json Files (*.json)")
1242        if file_name:
1243            try:
1244                with open(file_name, 'w') as file:
1245                    file.write(json_object)  # json file
1246            except Exception as e:
1247                pass
1248
1249    def buttonPresetNoClicked(self):
1250    #     """Makes all the buttons Enable style"""
1251        styleButton = 'QPushButton {background-color: qlineargradient(spread:repeat, x1:1, y1:0, x2:1, y2:1, stop:0 rgba(84, 84, 84, 255),stop:1 rgba(59, 59, 59, 255)); \
1252        min-width: 30px; border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; border-radius: 3px; border-color: #051a39; padding: 3px;}'
1253
1254        self.pushButtonPreset1.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1255        self.pushButtonPreset2.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1256        self.pushButtonPreset3.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1257        self.pushButtonPreset4.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1258        self.pushButtonPreset5.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1259        self.pushButtonPreset6.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1260        self.pushButtonPreset7.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1261        self.pushButtonPreset8.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1262        self.pushButtonPreset9.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1263        self.pushButtonPreset10.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1264        self.pushButtonPreset11.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1265        self.pushButtonPreset12.setStyleSheet(styleButton)
1266
1267    def buttonPresetClick(self, index):
1268        """Selects a favorite (preset).
1269        :param index: index of the chosen favorite.
1270        """
1271        self.buttonPresetNoClicked()
1272        match index:
1273            case 0:
1274                self.pushButtonPreset1.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1275                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1276                print(serviceID)
1277                self.favorite(serviceID)
1278            case 1:
1279                self.pushButtonPreset2.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1280                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1281                self.favorite(serviceID)
1282            case 2:
1283                self.pushButtonPreset3.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1284                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1285                self.favorite(serviceID)
1286            case 3:
1287                self.pushButtonPreset4.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1288                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1289                self.favorite(serviceID)
1290            case 4:
1291                self.pushButtonPreset5.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1292                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1293                self.favorite(serviceID)
1294            case 5:
1295                self.pushButtonPreset6.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1296                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1297                self.favorite(serviceID)
1298            case 6:
1299                self.pushButtonPreset7.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1300                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1301                self.favorite(serviceID)
1302            case 7:
1303                self.pushButtonPreset8.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1304                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1305                self.favorite(serviceID)
1306            case 8:
1307                self.pushButtonPreset9.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1308                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1309                self.favorite(serviceID)
1310            case 9:
1311                self.pushButtonPreset10.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1312                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1313                self.favorite(serviceID)
1314            case 10:
1315                self.pushButtonPreset11.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1316                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1317                self.favorite(serviceID)
1318            case 11:
1319                self.pushButtonPreset12.setStyleSheet('QPushButton {background-color: #A3C1DA; color: red;}')
1320                serviceID = self.presets[index].serviceID
1321                self.favorite(serviceID)
1322
1323    def favorite(self, serviceID):
1324        """Searches this preset in the services list and start this service."""
1325        self.nbServices = len(self.services)
1326        self.currentIndex = 0
1327        if self.nbServices != 0 :
1328            for row in range(0, self.nbServices):
1329                if self.services[row].serviceID == serviceID :
1330                    self.currentIndex = row
1331            self.startService()
1332
1333    def checkBoxArtistTitleClick(self):
1334        """The artist's name is displayed separately or not."""
1335        if self.checkBoxArtistTitle.isChecked():
1336            self.softLabelsArtistTitle()
1337        else:
1338            self.lineEditTitle.setText("")
1339            self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText(self.dynamicLabel)
1340
1341    def checkBoxMuteClick(self):
1342        """Selects whether to use silent mode."""
1343        self.bufferOut[0] = 0x00
1344        self.bufferOut[1] = 0x13
1345        self.bufferOut[2] = 0x00
1346        self.bufferOut[3] = 0x01
1347        self.bufferOut[4] = 0x03
1348        if self.checkBoxMute.isChecked():
1349            self.bufferOut[5] = 0x03
1350        else:
1351            self.bufferOut[5] = 0x00
1352        self.bufferOut[6] = 0x00
1353        self.bufferOut[7] = 0x00
1354        self.bufferOut[8] = 0x00
1355        self.bufferOut[9] = 0x00
1356        self.bufferOut[10] = 0x00
1357        self.bufferOut[11] = 0x00
1358        self.bufferOut[12] = 0x00
1359        self.bufferOut[13] = 0x00
1360        self.bufferOut[14] = 0x00
1361        self.bufferOut[15] = 0x00
1362        self.hidToSend = True
1363        self.hidSendCheck()
1364
1365    def checkBoxMonoClick(self):
1366        """Selects Mono or Stereo mode."""
1367        self.bufferOut[0] = 0x00
1368        self.bufferOut[1] = 0x13
1369        self.bufferOut[2] = 0x00
1370        self.bufferOut[3] = 0x02  # Property 0x0302. AUDIO_OUTPUT_CONFIG
1371        self.bufferOut[4] = 0x03
1372        if self.checkBoxMono.isChecked():
1373            self.bufferOut[5] = 0x01
1374        else:
1375            self.bufferOut[5] = 0x00
1376        self.bufferOut[6] = 0x00
1377        self.bufferOut[7] = 0x00
1378        self.bufferOut[8] = 0x00
1379        self.bufferOut[9] = 0x00
1380        self.bufferOut[10] = 0x00
1381        self.bufferOut[11] = 0x00
1382        self.bufferOut[12] = 0x00
1383        self.bufferOut[13] = 0x00
1384        self.bufferOut[14] = 0x00
1385        self.bufferOut[15] = 0x00
1386        self.hidToSend = True
1387        self.hidSendCheck()
1388
1389    def hScrollBarVolumeValueChanged(self):
1390        """
1391        When the volume's scrollbar changes, the volume is modified.
1392        """
1393        self.volume()
1394
1395    def volume(self):
1396        """
1397        Changes the volume.
1398        """
1399        # self.labelVolume = str(self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.value())
1400        self.bufferOut[0] = 0x00
1401        self.bufferOut[1] = 0x13
1402        self.bufferOut[2] = 0x00
1403        self.bufferOut[3] = 0x00
1404        self.bufferOut[4] = 0x03  # Property 0x0300. AUDIO_ANALOG_VOLUME
1405        self.bufferOut[5] = self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.value()
1406        self.bufferOut[6] = 0x00
1407        self.bufferOut[7] = 0x00
1408        self.bufferOut[8] = 0x00
1409        self.bufferOut[9] = 0x00
1410        self.bufferOut[10] = 0x00
1411        self.bufferOut[11] = 0x00
1412        self.bufferOut[12] = 0x00
1413        self.bufferOut[13] = 0x00
1414        self.bufferOut[14] = 0x00
1415        self.bufferOut[15] = 0x00
1416        self.hidToSend = True
1417        self.hidSendCheck()
1418
1419    def hidSendCheck(self):
1420        """
1421        Timer HID Send Tick
1422        """
1423        if self.hidToSend:  # True
1424            self.hidSend()
1425            if self.bufferOut[1] == 0x81:
1426                # Image clear
1427                self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("")
1428                self.lineEditTitle.setText("")
1429                self.lineEditPictureName.setText("")
1430                self.lineEditPacket.setText("")
1431                self.lineEditCurrentService.setText("")
1432                self.lineEditDateTime.setText("")
1433                self.labelBitRate.setText("Bit Rate : ")
1434                self.labelSampleRate.setText("Sample Rate : ")
1435                self.imageStart = False
1436                self.pictureByte.clear()
1437        else:
1438            self.hidToSend = False
1439
1440    def hidSend(self):
1441    # def hidSend(self, dataOut=b"\x00"):
1442        """Sends a command for the USB HID device
1443        HID Send
1444        dataOut: byte, command to the device
1445        """
1446        Out = ' '.join('{:02X}'.format(a) for a in self.bufferOut)
1447        self.lineEditBufferOut.setText(Out)
1448        # dataOut=b"\x00 ...
1449        dataOut = bytes(bytearray(self.bufferOut))
1450
1451        try:
1452            res1 = self.myDevice.write(dataOut)
1453            dataOutStr = ""
1454            for data in dataOut:
1455                dataOutStr += str("{0:02X}".format(data)) + " "
1456        except UsbHidIOError:
1457            msgBox = QMessageBox()
1458            msgBox.setWindowTitle("Message")
1459            msgBox.setText("Writing error")
1460            msgBox.setStandardButtons(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel)
1461            msgBox.setDefaultButton(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel)
1462            answer = msgBox.exec()
1463            if answer == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel:
1464                pass

DAB Radio panel (creating and playing)

Dab() 
104    def __init__(self):
105        """Initializes the MainWindow class"""
106        super().__init__()
107
108        # ---INIT PANEL ---
109        # Creating main window from dab.ui / dab.py
110        self.setupUi(self)
111        self.setWindowIcon(QIcon("radio.png"))
112        self.setWindowTitle("RADIO DAB")
113
114        # --- INIT SOME VARIABLE ---
115        # Read and write buffers
116        self.bufferIn = [0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
117                         0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
118                         0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00]
119        """
120        IN -> Read from the Device
121        Received data will be stored here - the first byte in the array is unused
122        bufferInSize = 40  -> Size of the data buffer coming IN to the PC
123        """
124        self.bufferOut = [0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
125                          0x00]
126        """
127        OUT -> Write to the device
128        Transmitted data is stored here - the first item in the array must be 0
129        bufferOutSize = 16  -> Size of the data buffer going OUT from the PC
130        """
131
132        #  Creating list of services
133        self.nbServices = 0
134        self.services = []
135        self.currentIndex = 0
136        self.totalServices = 0
137        self.tuneIndex = 0
138        self.rowPosition = 0
139        self.currentTuneIndex = 0
140        self.currentTuneFrequency = 0
141        self.currentEID = 0x00
142        self.currentComponentLabel = ""
143
144        #  Creating list of presets
145        self.nbPresets = 0
146        self.presets = []
147
148        self.hidToSend = False
149
150        # Init Status Bar
151        self.dynamicLabel = "Alain is - the best"
152        self.artist = ""
153        self.title = ""
154
155        self.packetIndex = 0
156        self.PADDataType = 0
157        self.DLSType = 0
158        self.MOTSLSType = 0
159        self.DLSLength = 0
160        self.SLSLength = 0
161        self.payloadLength = 0
162
163        self.jackStatus = 0x00
164        """Analog or Optical output"""
165        self.labelVolume = "0"
166
167        # Init Picture
168        self.imageStart = False
169        """Beginning for load the picture""" 
170        self.pathPicture = ""
171        """Path of the picture"""
172        self.pictureByte = QByteArray()
173        """Content of the picture in Byte format"""
174        self.pictureFile = "picture.jpg"
175        """Picture name for init"""
176        self.pictureResult = []
177        """Content array of the picture"""
178        self.fileJPG = QFile
179        """File for load Image"""
180        self.saveImage = False
181
182        # --- INIT DEVICE ---
183        self.myDevice = checkDevice()
184
185        # --- INIT SOME WIDGET ---
186        self.pushButtonOn.setEnabled(True)
187        self.pushButtonOff.setEnabled(False)
188        self.pushButtonScan.setEnabled(False)
189        self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(False)
190        self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(False)
191        self.checkBoxArtistTitle.setEnabled(False)
192        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setEnabled(False)
193        self.pushButtonSaveList.setEnabled(False)
194        self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(False)
195        self.checkBoxSaveImage.setEnabled(False)
196        self.presetsButtonDisabled()
197
198        self.toolStripStatusLabel1.setText("DAB Tuner not connected")
199        self.toolStripStatusLabel2.setText("")
200        self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("")
201        self.toolStripStatusLabel4.setText("")
202
203        self.bufferAddress = [0x00, 0x01, 0x02, 0x03, 0x04, 0x05, 0x06, 0x07, 0x08, 0x09, 0x10, 0x11, 0x012,
204                              0x13, 0x14, 0x15, 0x16, 0x17, 0x18, 0x19, 0x20, 0x21, 0x22, 0x23, 0x24, 0x25,
205                              0x26, 0x27, 0x28, 0x29, 0x30, 0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34, 0x35, 0x36, 0x37, 0x38,
206                              0x39]
207
208        self.dataAddress = ' '.join('{:02X}'.format(a) for a in self.bufferAddress)
209        self.lineEditAddress.setText(self.dataAddress)
210
211        self.led = QLed()
212        self.layoutPower.insertWidget(0, self.led)
213
214        self.image = QPixmap()
215
216        self.service = TableService()
217
218        self.ensemble = Ensemble()
219        # For scanning, create a tab :
220        # row -> tune index
221        # column -> 0: tune index, 1: frequency, 2: RSSI, 3: valid, 4: nb services
222        self.my_array = [[0 for col in range(5)] for row in range(41)]
223        headerH = ['Preset','Service Name', 'Service ID', 'Component ID', 'Tune Index', 'Tune Frequency kHz', 'EID',
224                   'Component Label', ]
225        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setHorizontalHeaderLabels(headerH)
226
227        # --- INIT CONNECTIONS ---
228        self.pushButtonOn.clicked.connect(self.on)
229        self.pushButtonOff.clicked.connect(self.off)
230        self.pushButtonScan.clicked.connect(self.buttonScanClick)
231
232        self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.valueChanged.connect(self.hScrollBarVolumeValueChanged)
233
234        self.tableWidgetViewServices.clicked.connect(self.dataGridViewServicesCellClick)
235
236        self.checkBoxMono.clicked.connect(self.checkBoxMonoClick)
237        self.checkBoxMute.clicked.connect(self.checkBoxMuteClick)
238
239        self.comboBoxAreas.addItems(["Default Area"])
240        self.comboBoxAreas.setCurrentText("Default Area")
241
242        self.checkBoxSaveImage.clicked.connect(self.saveImageEnable)
243
244        self.memory = False
245        self.pushButtonMemory.clicked.connect(self.buttonMemoryClick)
246
247        # Find the different Services list (json files in json directory)
248        # and add this services list in Areas comboBx
249        self.getServicesFile()
250        self.pushButtonSaveList.clicked.connect(self.saveServicesList)
251
252        # --- PUSH BUTTON PRESETS ---
253
254        self.pushButtonPreset1.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(0))
255        self.pushButtonPreset2.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(1))
256        self.pushButtonPreset3.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(2))
257        self.pushButtonPreset4.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(3))
258        self.pushButtonPreset5.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(4))
259        self.pushButtonPreset6.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(5))
260        self.pushButtonPreset7.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(6))
261        self.pushButtonPreset8.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(7))
262        self.pushButtonPreset9.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(8))
263        self.pushButtonPreset10.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(9))
264        self.pushButtonPreset11.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(10))
265        self.pushButtonPreset12.clicked.connect(lambda: self.buttonPresetClick(11))
266
267        # --- CHECK SOME FUNCTION
268        # self.pushButtonTest4.clicked.connect(self.timer4Tick)
269
270        self.com = Communicate()
271
272        # --- INIT TIMERS ---
273        # Power Up -> delay one shot 100 mSec
274        self.timerPowerUp = QTimer()
275        self.timerPowerUp.setSingleShot(True)
276        self.timerPowerUp.timeout.connect(self.open)
277
278        # Power Down -> delay one shot 50 mSec
279        self.timerPowerDown = QTimer()
280        self.timerPowerDown.setSingleShot(True)
281        self.timerPowerDown.timeout.connect(self.off)
282
283        # Artist Title -> delay one shot 100 mSec
284        self.timerArtistTitle = QTimer()
285        self.timerArtistTitle.setSingleShot(True)
286        # self.timerArtistTitle.timeout.connect(self.timerArtistTitleTick)
287
288        # New Ensemble -> delay one shot 300 mSec
289        self.timerNewEnsemble = QTimer()
290        self.timerNewEnsemble.setSingleShot(True)
291        self.timerNewEnsemble.timeout.connect(self.timerNewEnsembleTick())
292
293        # Read device -> periodic delay 50 mSec
294        self.timerReadDevice = QTimer()
295        self.timerReadDevice.timeout.connect(self.readDevice)
296
297        # HID to send -> delay 50 mSec
298        # self.timerHidToSend = QTimer()
299        # self.timerHidToSend.timeout.connect(self.timerHidToSendTick())

Initializes the MainWindow class

bufferIn

IN -> Read from the Device Received data will be stored here - the first byte in the array is unused bufferInSize = 40 -> Size of the data buffer coming IN to the PC

bufferOut

OUT -> Write to the device Transmitted data is stored here - the first item in the array must be 0 bufferOutSize = 16 -> Size of the data buffer going OUT from the PC

nbServices
services
currentIndex
totalServices
tuneIndex
rowPosition
currentTuneIndex
currentTuneFrequency
currentEID
currentComponentLabel
nbPresets
presets
hidToSend
dynamicLabel
artist
title
packetIndex
PADDataType
DLSType
MOTSLSType
DLSLength
SLSLength
payloadLength
jackStatus

Analog or Optical output

labelVolume
imageStart

Beginning for load the picture

pathPicture

Path of the picture

pictureByte

Content of the picture in Byte format

pictureFile

Picture name for init

pictureResult

Content array of the picture

fileJPG

File for load Image

saveImage
myDevice
bufferAddress
dataAddress
led
image
service
ensemble
my_array
memory
com
timerPowerUp
timerPowerDown
timerArtistTitle
timerNewEnsemble
timerReadDevice
def off(self): 
302    def off(self):
303        """Power Off"""
304        self.led.toggleValue()
305        self.toolStripStatusLabel1.setText("DAB Tuner Disconnected")
306        self.toolStripStatusLabel2.setText("")
307        self.toolStripStatusLabel3.setText("")
308        self.toolStripStatusLabel4.setText("")
309        self.pushButtonOn.setEnabled(True)
310        self.pushButtonOff.setEnabled(False)
311        self.comboBoxAreas.setEnabled(True)
312        self.tableWidgetViewServices.setEnabled(False)
313        self.presetsButtonDisabled()
314        self.clearPanel()
315        self.clearTextBox()

Power Off

def close(self): 
317    def close(self):
318        """Closes the device (Stand by)."""
319        # self.timerPowerDown.stop()
320        self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setValue(0)
321        self.bufferOut[0] = 0x00
322        self.bufferOut[1] = 0x00  # Stand by the device ( stop the HID coming IN to the PC )
323        # self.hidToSend = True
324        self.hidSend()
325        self.timerPowerDown.start(50) # Power off after 50ms delay

Closes the device (Stand by).

def clearPanel(self): 
327    def clearPanel(self):
328        """Clears this panel."""
329        self.labelRSSI.setText("0 db V")
330        self.labelSNR.setText("0 dB")
331        self.labelCNR.setText("0 dB")
332        self.labelFIC.setText("0")
333        self.checkBoxMono.setEnabled(False)
334        self.checkBoxMute.setEnabled(False)
335        self.checkBoxSaveImage.setEnabled(False)
336        self.horizontalScrollBarVolume.setEnabled(False)

Clears this panel.

def clearTextBox(self): 
338    def clearTextBox(self):
339        """Clears all TextBox (lineEdit)"""
340        self.lineEditCurrentService.setText("")
341        self.lineEditArtistDLS.setText("")
342        self.lineEditTitle.setText("")
343        self.lineEditBufferIn.setText("")
344        self.lineEditBufferOut.setText("")
345        self.lineEditPacket.setText("")
